name: Soundcore by Anker P20i True Wireless Earbuds, 10mm Drivers with Big Bass, Bluetooth 5.3, 30H Long Playtime, Water-Resistant, 2 Mics for AI Clear Calls, 22 Preset EQs, Customization via App
highlights: Powerful Bass: soundcore P20i true wireless earbuds have oversized 10mm drivers that deliver powerful sound with boosted bass so you can lose yourself in your favorite songs.
Personalized Listening Experience: Use the soundcore app to customize the controls and choose from 22 EQ presets. With "Find My Earbuds", a lost earbud can emit noise to help you locate it.

Long Playtime, Fast Charging: Get 10 hours of battery life on a single charge with a case that extends it to 30 hours. If P20i true wireless earbuds are low on power, a quick 10-minute charge will give you 2 hours of playtime.

Portable On-the-Go Design: soundcore P20i true wireless earbuds and the charging case are compact and lightweight with a lanyard attached. It's small enough to slip in your pocket, or clip on your bag or keys–so you never worry about space.
AI-Enhanced Clear Calls: 2 built-in mics and an AI algorithm work together to pick up your voice so that you never have to shout over the phone.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 17, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body: Outstanding! For the low price (~$20), this is an amazing ear set. I have been using Apple Airpods and then SamSung Buds for the past 6 years. As expected, this set does not have all the features like Apple's or Samsung's, but having used this set for several months, now I am wondering if I ever really needed those features (for a price of $150-200!). Great sound, long battery, light but solid build quality, coupled with no fear of losing! The only thing is that when I drop it on the floor, it opens up. Each pod is made of two pieces, which separate as it hits the floor. After having to click them back together several times, I added superglue before click them back on both sides. Now they don't open up. Definitely recommend this set.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 17, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I never write reviews, but I have to for this product. Just as most have said, these are AWESOME. I have had nothing but bad experiences with other wireless earbuds so I stayed away from them. But as my over the ear headphones of 8 years stopped working, I had to buy new headphones so I decided to give them another chance. I kept hearing good things about Soundcore so I trusted the reviews and they live up to the hype completely. The audio quality of course isn't the best, but it's clear enough, loud enough, and has enough fidelity not just for the pricepoint, but in my honest opinion exceeds it. But the most important thing of all, connectivity. That is the number one factor when looking for wireless earbuds. Many earbuds have decent quality, but if they don't stay connected, who cares. These always stay connected. Previous earbuds, the right would connect but not the left. This is because with other earbuds the right is the primary connected device, while the left is connected to the right bud. With these, it seems both buds are connected simultaneously. Also, these aren't just good for music and movies, even in games they don't lose their synchronicity. Only one problem, when I tried playing a PC game and watching a movie at the same time, the buds did cause significant lag and input delays in my game, but that is totally forgiveable. When the buds are dedicated just t your game and not to another app they work very decently. Most wireless earbuds I tried in the past always had this problem of synchronizing to games. I am absolutely blown away at the quality of these for the price. The biggest downside I have heard is they only last about a year before they stop being functional. But still, for only $20 these are unbeatable if you're on a budget. I recommend the a20i over the p20i as the bass is a little too loud, but you can easily fix this by downloading the soundcore app and choosing the "reduce bass" EQ setting. Also, these are bluetooth only. They don't utilize a USB dongle. So if you have an older laptop or desktop that doesn't have bluetooth, you will need to purchase either a bluetooth dongle or a bluetooth/wifi PCI-E card for your desktop.
Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 17, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body: Anker makes really good stuff all the time. For a really good price no less. They are a real bang-for-buck type company in the best way meaning possible. These earbuds are genuinely very impressive. I’d say they are most definitely better than Airpod gen 1’s. The cups are excellent and cut off any outside noise. The bass is very smooth for this price point, the vocals are clear, maybe the treble is a little overpowered by the bass, but besides the bigger charging case and slightly bigger appearance and fit, these are superior to gen 1 airpods for sure and for $20 on sale you literally cannot beat this with any other option. The charge hold time is excellent too and the case charges fast.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 26, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body: I bought two of these, They Worked Great but after around 9 months they lose their spark and for me the bluetooth isnt working anymore, And also The magnet loses its strenght and when dropped the earbuds fly out, Other than that they are AWESOME, they fit well, they sound better than 99% of the earpods, they are around the same size as a airpod, And they have touch contols! If you are looking for a Budget Earpod without Noise cancellation, You should pick These, they will last you around 9 -12 months if used daily👍

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 6, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
These earbuds are impressive for the price. The sound quality is clear with strong bass, thanks to the 10mm drivers, and they work well for music, videos, and calls. The app with EQ presets is a nice bonus—you can easily customize the sound to your preference.

Battery life is excellent. With the case, they last a long time, and I don’t have to charge them frequently. Bluetooth 5.3 provides a stable connection without drops.

They’re lightweight and comfortable to wear, and the fit stays secure even during movement. Call quality is also decent with the dual mics.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 22, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
These earbuds get a true 5 stars for multiple reasons.

They are comfortable, sound quality is so so so good, they hook up to my phone and laptop quickly without problems every time, they have crisp clear sound and the app has customizable sound options that are very intuitive, I can wear them in the shower bc they have a wonderful water resistance rating ( one of my earbuds has went through the washer not once but TWICE and took a ride in the dryer and STILL FUNCTIONS EXACTLY THE SAME), they charge quick and have a loooooooong battery life. I know there are more pros that I could list here but I think you get the gist.

Cons- genuinely none that I can think of, I am not paid for this review and this was not a free product given to me either.

These bad boys were under 25 dollars, sound great, and can take a serious beating. If you are on the fence, just get them! I promise you won't regret it! I lost one of the earbuds about a month ago and will be ordering these again. They are my ride or die. THANK YOU ANKER FOR THESE AMAZING AFFORDABLE EARBUDS ❤️

There is no reason to spend a lot of money on earbuds when anker is right here with these affordable gems 💎
Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in Australia on March 11, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
Excellent product. Great sound. Easy to connect, great battery life, not a massively long range connection (although my other earbuds are Bose so can't really compete) so you need to stay near your phone, in saying that... They're still well worth it for the price. This is my second pair as I like having multiples as I use them so much. So obviously it shows they're great.

Anyone who is on the fence to buy, they're very similar to Sony link buds which are 10x more expensive, these are absolutely comparable to those. And for the price, excellent.

reviews.date: Reviewed in Spain on April 22, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body: En mi opinión, son los mejores que te puedes comprar por unos 20€, suenan estupendo y fuerte, la batería dura mucho, no cuesta sacarlos del cofre ( que hay algunos que no veas ), se conectan al instante, y no los paras sin querer al mínimo roce ( lo cual da bastante rabia ).

reviews.date: Reviewed in Sweden on April 22, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body: Jag har en dålig vana – jag sover med hörlurar. Mina dyrare hörlurar gick alltid sönder efter typ 3 månader (rör mig för mycket i sömnen 😅). Så jag började köpa billigare istället. Men den här modellen… har hållit i över ett år, batteriet är fortfarande grymt och inget har gått sönder. Riktigt bra hörlurar!

The audio quality of course isn't the best, but it's clear enough, loud enough, and has enough fidelity not just for the pricepoint, but in my honest opinion exceeds it. But the most important thing of all, connectivity. That is the number one factor when looking for wireless earbuds. Many earbuds have decent quality, but if they don't stay connected, who cares. These always stay connected. Previous earbuds, the right would connect but not the left. This is because with other earbuds the right is the primary connected device, while the left is connected to the right bud. With these, it seems both buds are connected simultaneously. Also, these aren't just good for music and movies, even in games they don't lose their synchronicity. Only one problem, when I tried playing a PC game and watching a movie at the same time, the buds did cause significant lag and input delays in my game, but that is totally forgiveable. When the buds are dedicated just t your game and not to another app they work very decently. Most wireless earbuds I tried in the past always had this problem of synchronizing to games. I am absolutely blown away at the quality of these for the price. The biggest downside I have heard is they only last about a year before they stop being functional. But still, for only $20 these are unbeatable if you're on a budget. I recommend the a20i over the p20i as the bass is a little too loud, but you can easily fix this by downloading the soundcore app and choosing the "reduce bass" EQ setting. Also, these are bluetooth only. They don't utilize a USB dongle. So if you have an older laptop or desktop that doesn't have bluetooth, you will need to purchase either a bluetooth dongle or a bluetooth/wifi PCI-E card for your desktop.

name: Soundcore by Anker P20i True Wireless Earbuds, 10mm Drivers with Big Bass, Bluetooth 5.3, 30H Long Playtime, Water-Resistant, 2 Mics for AI Clear Calls, 22 Preset EQs, Customization (White)
availability: FREE delivery May 11 - 22 to Philippines on eligible orders over PHP 3,010.07
highlights: Powerful Bass: soundcore P20i true wireless earbuds have oversized 10mm drivers that deliver powerful sound with boosted bass so you can lose yourself in your favorite songs.
Personalized Listening Experience: Use the soundcore app to customize the controls and choose from 22 EQ presets. With "Find My Earbuds", a lost earbud can emit noise to help you locate it.

Long Playtime, Fast Charging: Get 10 hours of battery life on a single charge with a case that extends it to 30 hours. If P20i true wireless earbuds are low on power, a quick 10-minute charge will give you 2 hours of playtime.

Portable On-the-Go Design: soundcore P20i true wireless earbuds and the charging case are compact and lightweight with a lanyard attached. It's small enough to slip in your pocket, or clip on your bag or keys–so you never worry about space.
AI-Enhanced Clear Calls: 2 built-in mics and an AI algorithm work together to pick up your voice so that you never have to shout over the phone.

reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body: Outstanding! For the low price (~$20), this is an amazing ear set. I have been using Apple Airpods and then SamSung Buds for the past 6 years. As expected, this set does not have all the features like Apple's or Samsung's, but having used this set for several months, now I am wondering if I ever really needed those features (for a price of $150-200!). Great sound, long battery, light but solid build quality, coupled with no fear of losing! The only thing is that when I drop it on the floor, it opens up. Each pod is made of two pieces, which separate as it hits the floor. After having to click them back together several times, I added superglue before click them back on both sides. Now they don't open up. Definitely recommend this set.

name: HAOYUYAN Wireless Earbuds, Sports Bluetooth Headphones, 80Hrs Playtime Ear Buds with LED Power Display, Noise Canceling Headset, IPX7 Waterproof Earphones for Workout/Running(Black)
highlights: 【Sports Comfort & IPX7 Waterproof】Designed for extended workouts, the BX17 earbuds feature flexible ear hooks and three sizes of silicone tips for a secure, personalized fit. The IPX7 waterproof rating ensures protection against sweat, rain, and accidental submersion (up to 1 meter for 30 minutes), making them ideal for intense training, running, or outdoor adventures

【Immersive Sound & Noise Cancellation】Equipped with 14.3mm dynamic drivers and advanced acoustic tuning, these earbuds deliver powerful bass, crisp highs, and balanced mids. The ergonomic design enhances passive noise isolation, while the built-in microphone ensures clear voice pickup during calls—even in noisy environments

【Type-C Fast Charging & Tactile Controls】Recharge the case in 1.5 hours via USB-C and get back to your routine quickly. Intuitive physical buttons let you adjust volume, skip tracks, answer calls, and activate voice assistants without touching your phone—perfect for sweaty or gloved hands

【80-Hour Playtime & Real-Time LED Display】Enjoy up to 15 hours of playtime per charge (80 hours total with the portable charging case). The dual LED screens on the case display precise battery levels at a glance, so you’ll never run out of power mid-workout

【Auto-Pairing & Universal Compatibility】Hall switch technology enables instant pairing: simply open the case to auto-connect to your last-used device. Compatible with iOS, Android, tablets, and laptops (Bluetooth 5.3), these earbuds ensure stable connectivity up to 33 feet

【Eco-Friendly & Sustainable Design】BX17 Wireless Earbuds are designed with eco-conscious materials and energy-efficient technology to reduce environmental impact. The durable build and long-lasting battery minimize waste, while, energy-saving features ensure lower power consumption. By choosing BX17, you’re not only enjoying premium audio but also supporting sustainable practices for a greener future

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 25, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I bought these wireless sports earbuds and they’ve been a great choice, especially for exercising. The first thing that stands out is the ear hook design, which keeps them securely in place even when running or doing intense movements.

They’re very comfortable to wear for long periods and don’t fall out easily. The sweat-resistant feature is a big plus, so you can use them without worry during tough workouts.

The battery life is solid, just as advertised, which is perfect if you don’t want to charge them all the time. As for sound quality, it’s good for everyday use—music, podcasts, and calls—but don’t expect premium-level audio.

On the downside, the design might feel a bit bulky for some people, and the sound could have a bit more bass.

Overall, they’re a great value for the price, especially if you’re looking for comfortable, durable earbuds for sports and daily use.

Recommended for workouts and everyday listening.

name: HAOYUYAN Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth Headphones, Ear Buds with 80hr Playtime, LED Power Display, Noise Canceling, LED Power Display, IPX7 Waterproof Earphones for Gym/Workout/Sport（Dark Blue）
highlights: 【Sports Comfort & IPX7 Waterproof】 Designed with elastic, soft ear hooks and three-sized ear tips, the BX17 wireless earbuds stay securely in place for ultimate comfort during workouts. The IPX7 waterproof rating resists sweat and water splashes, making them ideal for sports, fitness, running, and intense exercise.

【Fast Pairing & Wide Compatibility】 Hall switch technology enables automatic power-on and instant reconnection to your last paired device when the charging case opens—no manual setup required. Enjoy seamless compatibility with most Bluetooth devices.

【ENC Noise Cancelling & Immersive Stereo Sound】 14.3mm drivers and an in-ear acoustic structure deliver punchy bass and crisp treble. The ENC technology and balanced air pressure design minimize sound leakage and ambient noise, ensuring clear calls and immersive audio even in loud environments—perfect for work, workouts, or downtime.

【Upgraded 80H Playtime & LED Power Display】 The upgraded BX17 offers 15 hours per charge (80 hours total Noise Cancellation15 hours longer than the 1st gen. The case provides 8 full recharges, while the dual LED display shows real-time battery levels when opened or closed.

【Type-C Fast Charging & Intuitive Touch Controls】 A Type-C fast-charging case ensures quick power-ups. Effortlessly manage music, calls, and volume with one-touch button controls—all designed for a smooth, user-friendly experience.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 25, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I bought these wireless sports earbuds and they’ve been a great choice, especially for exercising. The first thing that stands out is the ear hook design, which keeps them securely in place even when running or doing intense movements.

They’re very comfortable to wear for long periods and don’t fall out easily. The sweat-resistant feature is a big plus, so you can use them without worry during tough workouts.

The battery life is solid, just as advertised, which is perfect if you don’t want to charge them all the time. As for sound quality, it’s good for everyday use—music, podcasts, and calls—but don’t expect premium-level audio.

On the downside, the design might feel a bit bulky for some people, and the sound could have a bit more bass.

Overall, they’re a great value for the price, especially if you’re looking for comfortable, durable earbuds for sports and daily use.

Recommended for workouts and everyday listening.

name: HAOYUYAN Wireless Earbuds Bluetooth 5.3 Headphones with 80H Playback, IPX7 Waterproof Over Ear Buds with LED Power Display for Sports Running Workouts Gray Black
highlights: 【Impeccable Sound & Loud Call】- Equipped with 14.2mm speaker, the wireless headphones deliver well-balanced and exceptional sound, ensuring every note and beat is crisp and immersive. And the built-in microphone and snug fit design will effectively filters out noise during calls, guaranting seamless call quality for those important conversations on the go. Immerse yourself in crystal-clear audio and indulge in high-fidelity music

【Extended 80 Hours Playback】- Our T16 wireless earbuds boast a 70mAh battery, allowing up to 8 hours for continuous use (at 50%-60% volume) on a single charge. With the 600mAh large-capacity charging case, you can enjoy a total playtime of approximately 90 hours, you can keep grooving to your favorite tunes all day long. With an external digital LED display on the charging station, you can easily keep track of the battery level without opening the case and plan your charging accordingly

【Sports Comfort & IPX7 Waterproof】- Designed with elastic and soft ear hooks, these Bluetooth sports earbuds stay securely in place and provide ultimate comfort even during extended workout sessions. The earphones come with three different sizes of ear tips, ensuring a perfect fit for various ear sizes. With an IPX7 waterproof rating, they effectively resist water splashes and sweat, making them ideal for sports, fitness, workouts, and running

【Bluetooth 5.3 for Seamless Pairing】- Thanks to the advanced Bluetooth 5.3 technology, pairing and connecting to your device has never been faster and easier. Say goodbye to any frustrating lag or connection drops. Just open the charging case lid, the wireless headsets will quickly connect with your device automatically (after 1st successful connection). And they are widely compatible with most Bluetooth-enabled devices including Phone or Android or Windows, smart TV, laptop, tablets etc

【Effortless Charging & Intuitive Touch Control】- You can use the fast Type-C cable. The sensitive touch control feature provides a hassle-free user experience, you can stay in control of your audio experience with one-touch, making it easy to control the music playback, adjust the volume, and manage calls with a simple touch, putting all the operation at your fingertips

【Eco-Friendly & Sustainable Design】T16 Wireless Earbuds are designed with eco-conscious materials and energy-efficient technology to reduce environmental impact. The durable build and long-lasting battery minimize waste, while, energy-saving features ensure lower power consumption. By choosing T16, you’re not only enjoying premium audio but also supporting sustainable practices for a greener future
description:

Enjoy 15 hours of playtime (80hrs total with case) with LED power monitoring, Type-C fast charging, and intuitive one-touch controls—perfect for fitness, travel, or daily use.

Overall, they’re a great value for the price, especially if you’re looking for comfortable, durable earbuds for sports and daily use.

Recommended for workouts and everyday listening.

reviews.date: Reviewed in Germany on November 4, 2024
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
Auch hier ist es ein wenig dem Gefallen des Einzelnen überlassen. In den heutigen Zeiten ist das Qualitätsniveau dieser Dinger ja inzwischen schon von Hause aus so hoch, dass man eigentlich nur noch auf hohem Niveau Jammern kann. Selbst das Preis/Leistungsverhältnis ist im Grunde auch kein echtes Kriterium mehr. Natürlich kann man sich da auch noch ordentlich mit Markenprodukten finanziell so richtig die Kante geben, aber für das normale Hörverständnis, oder sagen wir mal, dem alltäglichen Gebrauch ist das alles schon sehr relativ geworden.
Neben der Qualitätskontrolle wollte ich hier mal sehen, in wie weit ich diese für meine Joggingaktivitäten einsetzten kann. Da kann ich sagen, die saßen perfekt! Die Bügel waren irgendwie genau richtig lang, wirkten kürzer als die meiner vergleichbaren Produkte. Auch bei längerem Tragen waren die am Ohr bequem.

Ansonsten war eine recht gut lesbare Bedienungsanleitung mit dabei. Ich konnte die schnell und leichte mit meinem Handy koppeln. Sie hatten ein Sprach- & Verständigungsqualität. Das Preis- / Leistungsverhältnis ist mehr als ok. Auch die Akkulaufzeit war wirklich gut. Nach stundenlangem Gebrauch waren die immer noch nicht leer. Auch das Aussehen war ansehnlich modern.
Lediglich der Bluetoothempfang war doch recht begrenzt, wenn man sich vom Gerät entfernte. Hat jetzt beim Joggen nicht wirklich gestört, sollte aber beachtet werden! Das waren vielleicht so 4 m ohne Wände dazwischen ;-(

Zurückgeschickt habe ich die aber nur, weil mir am Ende im Vergleich der Sound eines anderen Kopfhörers gleicher Preisklasse besser gefiel. Deren Sound war da halt etwas „brillianter“.

Fällt aber auch wieder in die Kategorie: „Über Geschmack lässt sich nicht streiten“ 😉 Trotzdem Daumen hoch mit der klaren Empfehlung zur Hörprobe vor Kauf. Und wie für alle meine Rezensionen gilt auch für diese: Wer Schreibfehler findet, der darf Sie behalten ;-)

reviews.date: Reviewed in Italy on June 15, 2024
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
Ho comprato questi auricolari per andare a correre,visto che con i precedenti che avevo continuavano a sfilarsi costantemente dalle orecchie.
La conformazione di questi C6 fanno in modo che l'archetto sopra l'orecchio non faccia uscire l'auricolare e costringa ogni 500 mt a fermarsi e a regolarli.
Dove li metti rimangono,non si sente quel fastidioso calo del volume dovuto alla lenta ed inesorabile uscita dei normali auricolari in ear.
e già questo basterebbe a giustificarne l'acquisto...ma veniamo al lato qualitativo:
Sono rimasto colpito dall'eccellente qualità del suono,sempre ben bilanciato tra alti medi e bassi,anche correndo non si sente quel fastidioso suono prodotto dal battito del passo che fa tremare gli auricolari in ear e rimbombano nell'orecchio,questi rimangono perfettamente immobili e ti regalano un suono cristallino ma all'occorrenza con dei buoni bassi.
l'accoppiamento allo smartphone (sia Android che Ios) è immediato,non mi è mai successo che perdano il segnale bluetooth o che si sconnettano,mai!
Ormai li uso da 2 settimane e posso assicurare che per lo sport sono il giusto compromesso tra costo/qualità.
La durata degli auricolari è di alcune ore,comunque sempre sufficienti anche per una mezza maratona.
La ricarica della base è ancora migliore,si riesce a ricaricare completamente secondo me almeno 6-7 volte
ma questo non ho avuto ancora modo di provarlo perchè quando li ripongo nel loro alloggiamento finita la mia sessione di corsa sono ancora al 50-60 per cento e dopo due settimane devo ancora ricaricare la base una volta.
la connessione bluetooth 5.3 da una connessione di 15 mt dal telefono,non 10 come il 5.0 ma chiaramente avendo il telefono con me mentre corro non posso aver verificato la distanza ma credo che la qualità del 5.3 si riveda nella limpidezza della connessione che come dicevo prima non fa perdere un solo secondo di segnale.
comprateli senza bisogno di pensarci se volete spendere poco ed avere auricolari per la corsa di grandissima qualità sia ergonomica che per qualità del suono!
CONSIGLIATISSIMI!!!

name: Soundcore P30i by Anker Noise Cancelling Earbuds, Strong and Smart Noise Cancelling, Powerful Bass, 45H Playtime, 2-in-1 Case and Phone Stand, IP54, Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 (Green)
highlights: 2-in-1 Charging Case and Phone Stand: Enjoy hands-free viewing without the hassle. Simply open the back panel of the case, place your phone on the stand, and catch up on your favorite shows—watching while traveling has never been easier!

Strong and Smart Noise Cancelling: Reduce noise by up to 42dB with an advanced active noise cancelling system. With adaptive technology, soundocre P30i detects external sound and automatically selects a level of noise cancelling optimized for your ears.
Transparency Mode: Let in the world or focus on your audio, the choice is yours. Simply switch to transparency mode to hear the world around you when needed.
Powerful Bass: Unleash deep, punchy bass with soundcore P30i noise cancelling earbuds' 10mm drivers, amplified by the soundcore exclusive BassUp technology for an immersive, robust audio experience.

Long-Lasting Convenience: Enjoy up to 10 hours of playtime (6 hours with ANC) on a single charge, and up to 45 hours with the case (25 hours with ANC). A quick 10-minute charge provides 2 hours of use, perfect for your on-the-go lifestyle.
4-Mic AI Enhanced Calls: Experience clear calls anywhere you go with 4 microphones built into the wireless earbuds, alongside an AI algorithm that picks up your voice with precision.
One-Step Pairing: soundcore P30i uses the latest Bluetooth 5.4 for easy pairing, automatically connecting with the last paired device when taking the earbuds from the case.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 27, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I’m really impressed with these Soundcore P30i earbuds by Anker. The sound quality is very good for the price, especially the bass. Music, videos, and phone calls all sound clear, and the noise cancelling works better than I expected for earbuds in this price range.
The battery life is one of the best parts. They last a long time between charges, and the charging case gives plenty of extra playtime. I also like the case design because it doubles as a small phone stand, which is a clever little feature that actually comes in handy when watching videos.
They connect quickly with Bluetooth, feel comfortable in the ears, and the app gives you extra control over the sound settings. The IP54 rating is also nice for everyday use, workouts, or being outside.
Overall, these are a great value. They sound good, the noise cancelling is solid, the battery life is strong, and they feel like a more expensive pair of earbuds than they actually are. Definitely worth buying.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on January 1, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
For pure sound quality, I recommend the Moondrop Space Travel TWS Earphone Bluetooth 5.3 Noise Canceling True Wireless Stereo IEMs(Black) over these. They are an off-brand, but popular, semi “in ear monitor” quality earbud. However, these Soundcore P30i are a lot easier to set up, change modes, an use, while not giving up much in terms of everyday music and video quality. Especially when watching tv and movies, you won’t likely notice any difference.

So, let’s start with a “strong average” rating for these earbuds. No bad habits. No annoying faults. No weird emphasis on one part of the sound spectrum.

How is set up? Well, be prepared for NO pairing button on the case or inside the hood. These enter paring mode automatically the first time you pull them out and remove the little plastic tabs off the charging spots. They will automatically pair with the most recently paired device IF it is on. Otherwise they go into pairing mode. If you really want to move them to another device, please delete from your old device first so you know what’s going on. (No probblem if your phone is stolen and you want to re-pair to your new phone).

There is another step that I recommend. Download the Soundcore app. Use it to customize your settings. Especially you need to deal with ANC - activve noise cancelling. Do you want it On, Off, or Automatic? And set up the desired right and left ear “taps” for usual stuff like activating a voice assistant or answering a call.

THE AUTOMATIC ON-OFF FOR ANC IS SOMETHING I HAVEN’T SEEN BEFORE. It doesn’t activate in my apartment even when noisy trucks go by. I assume if activates automatically on airplanes, where the engine and airstream noise are constant (other reviewers have flown and confirm this. HOWEVER, given the new menu on the control panel, make sure your earbuds are in Automatic mode; when these first shipped (I have early release and current release firmware versions) they were Automatic only, with no way to “force” ANC as with other ANC earbuds. I think these should ship in Automatic mode, but they seem to ship in ANC-off mode now; use the app to select Auto mode, and to set the taps you want to use to cycle through the three ANC, Normal (silicone tips block some external sounds), and Transparent modes (Transparent uses the mics to relay external sounds through to your ears, as though you don’t have silicone noise blocking tips in the ear canal).

Finally, the current firmware adds a chime to the three modes as you cycle through them.

I would like to see a set of XL for extra large ear tips. Apple has started doing this. It is a challenge for some earbud designs since the cup holding the tip would need to be larger so the earbuds fit, but then the stem with the charging pads might wobble. Apple and Beats seem to be the only makers with the XL option.

With L tips on, I have a good, but not snug, fit. On other earbuds with ANC test modes, I need noticeably snug earbud tips or I don’t bass the onboard ANC test.

I intend to keep the app on my device for my next flight and test out Automatic and forced ANC modes and see if there is any difference. Also, to compare to the original Beats (not the later Plus) version) earbuds. I don’t need high fidelity inflight, just enough ANC so I can actually hear dialogue over the cabin roar.

Finally, I have a drawer of varioius ANC options. Why did I invest another $30 in these? Disposability plus Anker assurance. In terms of disposability, keep in mind these don’t have a necklace - if one wiggles loose from yawning or eating and rolls away, it’s probably toast. No shrill alarm mode to help find it. Anker assurance? With the exception of a recalled powerbank, Anker has meant solid middle of the field design and reliability. Better audio than pre-Bose Skullcandy, actually comparable to the Solo Buds from Beats, but best value taking into account price, featrures, and quality. Heck, even without noise cancelling I would have bought these. With ANC they are a steal.

Then add in the neat built in phone stand, and killer battery capacity for 14 hour flights? No brainer.

reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body: These are fantastic little earbuds!! The sound quality is marvelous, I used them all the time at work or laying in bed watching a show on my iPad. I love that you’re able to seamlessly connect two devices at once, so I’m able to connect both my iPad and iPhone at the same time. You can’t play stuff simultaneously lets say you want to watch a video on your phone while you’re watching Netflix on the iPad, you can hit play and it’ll pause what you’re watching on your iPad and start playing the video on your phone! These earbuds are small and lightweight, they come with three different sizes to fit in your ear. I don’t use these often to make calls because I feel like they are slightly lacking in that aspect. Have too many instances of the other person not being able to hear me when I have them in. That said, I purchased these earbuds FOREVER ago, made sure they were fully charged and have not had a need to charge them yet! The battery life cannot be beat! They are definitely a great value. You get a fantastic, affordable pair of ear buds with an amazing battery light. Great buy!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 1, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I wish I could give 4.5 stars instead of just 4. I am a loyal Anker customer, and have had several Anker/Soundcore products over the years. I previously purchased the Soundcore by Anker Life A3i Noise Cancelling Wireless Earbuds, which I loved, but they had an issue that caused them to stop working before the warranty ran out and Anker replaced them for me with the Soundcore P30i - their customer service is exceptional and I highly recommend them! However, I *like* my new earbuds, but don’t *love* them.

Pros: same awesome battery life, decent color options (matters to me, not everyone cares about this), the noise canceling is nice if I’m outside walking (very windy where I live), easy Bluetooth connection, they fit well in my little bitty ears, work well for phone calls and the sound quality is everything you’d expect from an Anker product, amazing!

Cons: no physical buttons & no volume control (big deal for me). I have very sensitive hearing and kids at home, so I used the volume buttons constantly on my old pair. If volume control doesn’t matter to you, then these earbuds are ideal! But I prefer analog buttons over touch based, and not needing to be right next to my phone to change the volume - I walk around the house using these while my phone lives on a shelf.

Again, I highly recommend Anker, their products are outstanding and customer service is the best!

reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
You won’t find wireless earbuds with this level of performance and features anywhere near this price. This brand punches way above its weight when it comes to delivering quality without the premium price tag.
I use these daily—at the gym, on long commutes, and while walking outdoors. They stay secure even during runs (and I’ve got medium-sized ears). I mainly listen to podcasts and playlists, and occasionally hop on calls while I’m out and about.
Pros:
- 🔊 Rich audio quality, especially bass—perfect for cardio workouts or zoning out on the train.
- ✈️ Effective noise cancellation, especially for lower-frequency hums (like engines or crowd chatter).
- 📞 Crystal-clear call quality thanks to solid mics and smart noise-filtering—it cuts through background noise surprisingly well.
- 📶 Reliable Bluetooth connection with impressive range.
- 👂 Comfortable and secure fit, even during movement-heavy activities.
Cons:
- 🎵 Slight dip in sound quality compared to more expensive models—but it’s hardly noticeable unless you're an audiophile.
- 🔇 Noise cancellation could be stronger for high-pitched or inconsistent sounds.
Conclusion:
A phenomenal value—especially if you’re looking for everyday earbuds that handle music, calls, and movement like a champ. Highly recommended.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on March 16, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
It took me quite a while to choose a pair of reasonably priced earbuds that would actually work well for me. After a long search and reading many reviews I decided to try the Soundcore P30i by Anker and I’m genuinely glad I did.
From the moment I opened the box the experience felt great. The packaging is neat and well designed and the earbuds themselves feel solid and well made.
The sound quality is brilliant for the price - clear, powerful and balanced. The noise cancelling also works surprisingly well and really improves the listening experience in everyday environments.
One important thing for me is comfort. I have some hearing issues and have struggled with many earbuds in the past because they created pressure in my ears and became uncomfortable after a short time. These are completely different. The Soundcore P30i are very light and comfortable and I can wear them for long periods without that pressure feeling. For me these earbuds are a real game changer. Great sound, comfortable fit, good noise cancelling and excellent value for the price.
Strongly recommended — 10/10.

4-Mic AI Enhanced Calls: Experience clear calls anywhere you go with 4 microphones built into the wireless earbuds, alongside an AI algorithm that picks up your voice with precision.
One-Step Pairing: soundcore P30i uses the latest Bluetooth 5.4 for easy pairing, automatically connecting with the last paired device when taking the earbuds from the case.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 27, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I’m really impressed with these Soundcore P30i earbuds by Anker. The sound quality is very good for the price, especially the bass. Music, videos, and phone calls all sound clear, and the noise cancelling works better than I expected for earbuds in this price range.
The battery life is one of the best parts. They last a long time between charges, and the charging case gives plenty of extra playtime. I also like the case design because it doubles as a small phone stand, which is a clever little feature that actually comes in handy when watching videos.
They connect quickly with Bluetooth, feel comfortable in the ears, and the app gives you extra control over the sound settings. The IP54 rating is also nice for everyday use, workouts, or being outside.
Overall, these are a great value. They sound good, the noise cancelling is solid, the battery life is strong, and they feel like a more expensive pair of earbuds than they actually are. Definitely worth buying.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on January 1, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
For pure sound quality, I recommend the Moondrop Space Travel TWS Earphone Bluetooth 5.3 Noise Canceling True Wireless Stereo IEMs(Black) over these. They are an off-brand, but popular, semi “in ear monitor” quality earbud. However, these Soundcore P30i are a lot easier to set up, change modes, an use, while not giving up much in terms of everyday music and video quality. Especially when watching tv and movies, you won’t likely notice any difference.

So, let’s start with a “strong average” rating for these earbuds. No bad habits. No annoying faults. No weird emphasis on one part of the sound spectrum.

How is set up? Well, be prepared for NO pairing button on the case or inside the hood. These enter paring mode automatically the first time you pull them out and remove the little plastic tabs off the charging spots. They will automatically pair with the most recently paired device IF it is on. Otherwise they go into pairing mode. If you really want to move them to another device, please delete from your old device first so you know what’s going on. (No probblem if your phone is stolen and you want to re-pair to your new phone).

There is another step that I recommend. Download the Soundcore app. Use it to customize your settings. Especially you need to deal with ANC - activve noise cancelling. Do you want it On, Off, or Automatic? And set up the desired right and left ear “taps” for usual stuff like activating a voice assistant or answering a call.

THE AUTOMATIC ON-OFF FOR ANC IS SOMETHING I HAVEN’T SEEN BEFORE. It doesn’t activate in my apartment even when noisy trucks go by. I assume if activates automatically on airplanes, where the engine and airstream noise are constant (other reviewers have flown and confirm this. HOWEVER, given the new menu on the control panel, make sure your earbuds are in Automatic mode; when these first shipped (I have early release and current release firmware versions) they were Automatic only, with no way to “force” ANC as with other ANC earbuds. I think these should ship in Automatic mode, but they seem to ship in ANC-off mode now; use the app to select Auto mode, and to set the taps you want to use to cycle through the three ANC, Normal (silicone tips block some external sounds), and Transparent modes (Transparent uses the mics to relay external sounds through to your ears, as though you don’t have silicone noise blocking tips in the ear canal).

Finally, the current firmware adds a chime to the three modes as you cycle through them.

I would like to see a set of XL for extra large ear tips. Apple has started doing this. It is a challenge for some earbud designs since the cup holding the tip would need to be larger so the earbuds fit, but then the stem with the charging pads might wobble. Apple and Beats seem to be the only makers with the XL option.

With L tips on, I have a good, but not snug, fit. On other earbuds with ANC test modes, I need noticeably snug earbud tips or I don’t bass the onboard ANC test.

I intend to keep the app on my device for my next flight and test out Automatic and forced ANC modes and see if there is any difference. Also, to compare to the original Beats (not the later Plus) version) earbuds. I don’t need high fidelity inflight, just enough ANC so I can actually hear dialogue over the cabin roar.

Finally, I have a drawer of varioius ANC options. Why did I invest another $30 in these? Disposability plus Anker assurance. In terms of disposability, keep in mind these don’t have a necklace - if one wiggles loose from yawning or eating and rolls away, it’s probably toast. No shrill alarm mode to help find it. Anker assurance? With the exception of a recalled powerbank, Anker has meant solid middle of the field design and reliability. Better audio than pre-Bose Skullcandy, actually comparable to the Solo Buds from Beats, but best value taking into account price, featrures, and quality. Heck, even without noise cancelling I would have bought these. With ANC they are a steal.

Then add in the neat built in phone stand, and killer battery capacity for 14 hour flights? No brainer.
Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 14, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body: These are fantastic little earbuds!! The sound quality is marvelous, I used them all the time at work or laying in bed watching a show on my iPad. I love that you’re able to seamlessly connect two devices at once, so I’m able to connect both my iPad and iPhone at the same time. You can’t play stuff simultaneously lets say you want to watch a video on your phone while you’re watching Netflix on the iPad, you can hit play and it’ll pause what you’re watching on your iPad and start playing the video on your phone! These earbuds are small and lightweight, they come with three different sizes to fit in your ear. I don’t use these often to make calls because I feel like they are slightly lacking in that aspect. Have too many instances of the other person not being able to hear me when I have them in. That said, I purchased these earbuds FOREVER ago, made sure they were fully charged and have not had a need to charge them yet! The battery life cannot be beat! They are definitely a great value. You get a fantastic, affordable pair of ear buds with an amazing battery light. Great buy!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 1, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I wish I could give 4.5 stars instead of just 4. I am a loyal Anker customer, and have had several Anker/Soundcore products over the years. I previously purchased the Soundcore by Anker Life A3i Noise Cancelling Wireless Earbuds, which I loved, but they had an issue that caused them to stop working before the warranty ran out and Anker replaced them for me with the Soundcore P30i - their customer service is exceptional and I highly recommend them! However, I *like* my new earbuds, but don’t *love* them.

Pros: same awesome battery life, decent color options (matters to me, not everyone cares about this), the noise canceling is nice if I’m outside walking (very windy where I live), easy Bluetooth connection, they fit well in my little bitty ears, work well for phone calls and the sound quality is everything you’d expect from an Anker product, amazing!

Cons: no physical buttons & no volume control (big deal for me). I have very sensitive hearing and kids at home, so I used the volume buttons constantly on my old pair. If volume control doesn’t matter to you, then these earbuds are ideal! But I prefer analog buttons over touch based, and not needing to be right next to my phone to change the volume - I walk around the house using these while my phone lives on a shelf.

Again, I highly recommend Anker, their products are outstanding and customer service is the best!

reviews.date: Reviewed in Australia on March 19, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I bought these to replace Pixel Buds Pro and I'm astounded at the quality you get for the price. They connect quickly to the phone, have great noise cancelling and a decent microphone for calls. They fit comfortably and securely in my ear.
The only letdown is the touch controls which can be a little clunky and don't always register the taps. However being able to reasign the touch controls (via the app) is a big win.
They have good bass and are very clear when listening to podcasts. They fall slightly flat at the top end.
Highly recommend these!

reviews.date: Reviewed in Canada on August 1, 2025
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
You won’t find wireless earbuds with this level of performance and features anywhere near this price. This brand punches way above its weight when it comes to delivering quality without the premium price tag.
I use these daily—at the gym, on long commutes, and while walking outdoors. They stay secure even during runs (and I’ve got medium-sized ears). I mainly listen to podcasts and playlists, and occasionally hop on calls while I’m out and about.
Pros:
- 🔊 Rich audio quality, especially bass—perfect for cardio workouts or zoning out on the train.
- ✈️ Effective noise cancellation, especially for lower-frequency hums (like engines or crowd chatter).
- 📞 Crystal-clear call quality thanks to solid mics and smart noise-filtering—it cuts through background noise surprisingly well.
- 📶 Reliable Bluetooth connection with impressive range.
- 👂 Comfortable and secure fit, even during movement-heavy activities.
Cons:
- 🎵 Slight dip in sound quality compared to more expensive models—but it’s hardly noticeable unless you're an audiophile.
- 🔇 Noise cancellation could be stronger for high-pitched or inconsistent sounds.
Conclusion:
A phenomenal value—especially if you’re looking for everyday earbuds that handle music, calls, and movement like a champ. Highly recommended.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on March 16, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
It took me quite a while to choose a pair of reasonably priced earbuds that would actually work well for me. After a long search and reading many reviews I decided to try the Soundcore P30i by Anker and I’m genuinely glad I did.
From the moment I opened the box the experience felt great. The packaging is neat and well designed and the earbuds themselves feel solid and well made.
The sound quality is brilliant for the price - clear, powerful and balanced. The noise cancelling also works surprisingly well and really improves the listening experience in everyday environments.
One important thing for me is comfort. I have some hearing issues and have struggled with many earbuds in the past because they created pressure in my ears and became uncomfortable after a short time. These are completely different. The Soundcore P30i are very light and comfortable and I can wear them for long periods without that pressure feeling. For me these earbuds are a real game changer. Great sound, comfortable fit, good noise cancelling and excellent value for the price.
Strongly recommended — 10/10.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on January 1, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
For pure sound quality, I recommend the Moondrop Space Travel TWS Earphone Bluetooth 5.3 Noise Canceling True Wireless Stereo IEMs(Black) over these. They are an off-brand, but popular, semi “in ear monitor” quality earbud. However, these Soundcore P30i are a lot easier to set up, change modes, an use, while not giving up much in terms of everyday music and video quality. Especially when watching tv and movies, you won’t likely notice any difference.

So, let’s start with a “strong average” rating for these earbuds. No bad habits. No annoying faults. No weird emphasis on one part of the sound spectrum.

How is set up? Well, be prepared for NO pairing button on the case or inside the hood. These enter paring mode automatically the first time you pull them out and remove the little plastic tabs off the charging spots. They will automatically pair with the most recently paired device IF it is on. Otherwise they go into pairing mode. If you really want to move them to another device, please delete from your old device first so you know what’s going on. (No probblem if your phone is stolen and you want to re-pair to your new phone).

There is another step that I recommend. Download the Soundcore app. Use it to customize your settings. Especially you need to deal with ANC - activve noise cancelling. Do you want it On, Off, or Automatic? And set up the desired right and left ear “taps” for usual stuff like activating a voice assistant or answering a call.

THE AUTOMATIC ON-OFF FOR ANC IS SOMETHING I HAVEN’T SEEN BEFORE. It doesn’t activate in my apartment even when noisy trucks go by. I assume if activates automatically on airplanes, where the engine and airstream noise are constant (other reviewers have flown and confirm this. HOWEVER, given the new menu on the control panel, make sure your earbuds are in Automatic mode; when these first shipped (I have early release and current release firmware versions) they were Automatic only, with no way to “force” ANC as with other ANC earbuds. I think these should ship in Automatic mode, but they seem to ship in ANC-off mode now; use the app to select Auto mode, and to set the taps you want to use to cycle through the three ANC, Normal (silicone tips block some external sounds), and Transparent modes (Transparent uses the mics to relay external sounds through to your ears, as though you don’t have silicone noise blocking tips in the ear canal).

Finally, the current firmware adds a chime to the three modes as you cycle through them.

I would like to see a set of XL for extra large ear tips. Apple has started doing this. It is a challenge for some earbud designs since the cup holding the tip would need to be larger so the earbuds fit, but then the stem with the charging pads might wobble. Apple and Beats seem to be the only makers with the XL option.

With L tips on, I have a good, but not snug, fit. On other earbuds with ANC test modes, I need noticeably snug earbud tips or I don’t bass the onboard ANC test.

I intend to keep the app on my device for my next flight and test out Automatic and forced ANC modes and see if there is any difference. Also, to compare to the original Beats (not the later Plus) version) earbuds. I don’t need high fidelity inflight, just enough ANC so I can actually hear dialogue over the cabin roar.

Finally, I have a drawer of varioius ANC options. Why did I invest another $30 in these? Disposability plus Anker assurance. In terms of disposability, keep in mind these don’t have a necklace - if one wiggles loose from yawning or eating and rolls away, it’s probably toast. No shrill alarm mode to help find it. Anker assurance? With the exception of a recalled powerbank, Anker has meant solid middle of the field design and reliability. Better audio than pre-Bose Skullcandy, actually comparable to the Solo Buds from Beats, but best value taking into account price, featrures, and quality. Heck, even without noise cancelling I would have bought these. With ANC they are a steal.

Then add in the neat built in phone stand, and killer battery capacity for 14 hour flights? No brainer.

16 Months In and Still My Everyday Go-To

I use these AirPods for literally everything — phone calls, music, podcasts, working around my Airbnb property, camping trips, running errands, you name it. I bought them in December 2024 and they've been in my ears almost daily since.

Sound quality is still excellent. Whether I'm listening to music while turning over my Airbnb between guests or taking calls while setting up camp, the audio is clear and crisp. The Active Noise Cancellation is a game changer — when I need to focus, it blocks everything out. And when I need to hear what's going on around me, Transparency Mode switches seamlessly.

The USB-C charging case was a huge upgrade. No more hunting for a special cable — I use the same charger for everything. Battery life has held up great even after 16 months of heavy daily use.

Comfort-wise, I can wear these for hours without them bothering my ears. They stay put whether I'm cleaning, walking, or out on a trail.

Bottom line: If you're looking for wireless earbuds that do it all and actually last, these are it. I've had mine for well over a year of daily use and the sound quality, noise cancellation, and battery are all still performing like day one. Worth every penny.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on October 21, 2024
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I never take the time to write reviews because why spend so much time on something that will ultimately have no effect on my life? Well in this case, these Airpods have met and exceeded every single one of my expectations and I figured that was worth writing about.

Important disclaimers:
- OF COURSE this is a subjective opinion, because that is all a review is. Take it with a grain of salt.
- Different products work better or worse for different people, it's just that simple.
- When talking about noise cancelling headphones, it's important to consider them for what they are, not what we think they SHOULD be.

THE FIT:
OKAY. I am someone who has very small ear cannals. I have spent years trying to find earbuds that fit my ears comfortably. Silicone in-ear tips have always been extremely uncomfortable for me. That being said, I did own the first gen Airpods Pro for a couple of years before buying these Airpods 4. I wanted earbuds that I could exercise with, use for commuting, and use for blocking out sound when I'm at school or on an airplane. The airpods pro fit the bill, but I could only wear them for short periods of time before they would start to seriously hurt. On top of that, they would always slowly come out of my ears. It didn't matter what size of eartips I used. My ears are just NOT made for in-ear silicone tips. BUT THESE AIRPODS 4!!! Holy smokes they are so comfortable. They never fall out. I can wear them for hours at a time and not even notice them. I haven't worn a pair of Airpods this comfortable since the gen 2 Airpods. The 3's didn't work for me either, but somehow apple really cooked up the ideal fit for these Airpods 4.

THE NOISE CANCELLATION:
Okay. Obviously, these are NOT going to have the same level of noise reduction as in-ear earbuds because there is no seal created by any silicone tips. If Airpods Pros and silicone tips have always worked for you, just buy those. However, considering that the noise cancellation in these Airpods is ALL driven by software, I have been extremely impressed with the results. It reduces the white noise of annoying sounds like public trains, airplanes, etc. very effectively. While voices and other louder sounds aren't cancelled completely, when music is playing through the earbuds these noises are quite enough to hardly notice. For me, that's enough. I don't need complete silence, I have my over-ear noise cancelling headphones for that.

THE SOUND QUALITY:
When I say that I was blown away the first time I listened to music on these Airpods, I was NOT kidding. The amount of bass that they managed to pack in to such small, open-eared earbuds is frankly impressive. The sound profile allows for an incredible listening experience no matter what genre of music you listen to (I listen to a wide range of pop, folk, indie, and rap primarily).

THE OVERALL VERDICT:
These Airpods 4 with Active Noise Cancellation are exactly as I expected them to be. They fit extremely well, the ANC is very acceptable for what they are, and they sound amazing. That's not to mention the TINY case that they come in, making them so easy to slip anywhere. I have been looking for a solid pair of earbuds with ANC that work with my ears for the longest time now. I'm happy to say that these are everything I've ever wanted. If you have had issues with silicone ear-tip earbuds fitting you properly, then these are definitely worth a shot!

reviews.body:
Let me start by saying I've used a large number of different headphones, of different styles including over the ear, on ear and ear buds, from Bose, Beats, Sony, Apple and a number of lesser known brands. This review is being made after only having this set a few days, so it is an initial opinion.

In general I would say that the ANC of the more expensive brands is a bit better than the Soundcore, but to my ears not that much better.

There are 4 sets of ear tips. I have rather small ear canals so I use the XS set. These fit better than many of the other ear tips from the other ear buds that only have 3 and stop at S. These have been comfortable and stay in place.

I am currently using the out of box equalizer settings. I find the sound to be quite good even without making adjustments. Sound is very clear and not muddy. I haven't tried pumping up the bass, so I have no observations/recommendations there. The fact that you get a nice app to make adjustments if you so choose is a real plus.

I felt the included instruction booklet could have been better. I would suggest downloading the more detailed information files which provide more explanations.

I decided to try these after both my sets of expensive Apple AirPods Pro (both Pro 1 - ANC and Pro 2 - right bud) failed. The cost to repair the Apples was more expensive than this set.

I rated this 5-star, not as much for the absolute quality (which is still quite good), but rather more from the standpoint that these are an exceptional value for the money.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on December 9, 2025
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
WOW! It takes a lot these days for a purchase to genuinely blow me away, especially in the age of the countless low priced, questionable quality “audiophile grade” true wireless options out there. I have a pair on Sennheisser HD660s and Grado sr80s powered through a Fiios K5 Pro for at home listening. I needed something for the gym, being out and about, and most importantly travel.

THESE THINGS ARE THE BEST TRUE WIRELESS EAR BUDS I HAVE EVER USED. Greatly prefer these to AirPods. I was expecting just a decent sounding pair of Bluetooth earbuds and had proper expectations for the super low price of these. What I got is something that has to be experienced to convey just how awesome these things are.

Quick Pros/Things That Jumped Out
-Extremely comfortable fit with a wide range of sizes for every ear canal > the App literally will run a test to check if you have a proper seal to ensure the best sound
-THE APP! This is what has blown me away the most. This thing is BEAUTIFULLY designed and has some of the coolest features I have ever seen implemented in Bluetooth headphones:
-running a hearing test to tell each separate ear’s overall health when it comes to noise exposure and being able to pick up frequencies
-Ability to toggle between different modes(music, spatial, movie, games)
-Ability to adjust the degree of active noise cancellation, including different modes such as adaptive which will automatically adjust, being able to amplify sounds coming from a TV in the background for example, being able to have a conversation without pausing your music
-THE EQ IS SO IMPRESSIVE. It runs a series of A B tests to determine your distinct sound preferences to multiple variations of the same song where you choose if either A or B sounds better.
-Connection is effortless, the buttons are not only easy to actually use on the ear buds, but they are fully customizable
-COMFORT. I have been wearing these for 5 hours now and I’m not exaggerating when I say I don’t even notice them. Haven’t had to take them out a single time to let my “ears breathe”
-Super durable build. Was surprised by the heft of the case and buds themselves
-MOST IMPORTANT OF ALL- The sound quality is simply unparalleled as far as Bluetooth buds go. I would buy these for $200 without question. The EQ makes it so no matter your preference, you can tweak the sound to exactly how you like it. The fidelity, clarity, bass, highs, vocals, etc all shine.

This is one of the best purchases I have made in years and could not be more pleased

reviews.date: Reviewed in Brazil on March 28, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body: A experiência de áudio em músicas, filmes e jogos (neste ressalta as passadas e os tiros, além da direção deles, em jogo de FPS) é excelente com ótimo custo-benefício, ativei o LDAC e defini a maior taxa de banda de áudio nas opções de desenvolvedor do celular, além de ativar no App Soundcore. Só não gostei porque, diferente do P41i, quando ativa para jogos perde a conexão dupla, podendo conectar em 1 dispositivo apenas. A redução de ruído é maior que no P41i, além de ter opção de história pra dormir (em inglês) e mais opções de ruído branco... Não calculei o tempo médio que demora uma carga, mas já passei um dia inteiro e à noite às vezes no ouvido sem carregar e sem sentir desconforto no encaixe da orelha também. Estou muito, mas muito, satisfeito com esse fone. Super recomendo!!

reviews.date: Reviewed in Mexico on February 23, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
Tiene buen sonido relacionado precio- calidad, la cancelación de sonido es un 90% efectiva (aún no la he probado en exteriores), la batería también es buena al menos aguanta mi horario de 8hrs en oficina, son cómodos, la IA de traducción es un plus muy bueno y la app en general es bastante amigable… Llevo usándolo cerca de una semana y media y me están gustando mucho.

Lo único que podría mejorar es que no puedes conectarlo a dos dispositivos al mismo tiempo y el nivel de pila solo puedes verlo en la app o en el reproductor de música.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the Netherlands on March 2, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body: Perfecte prijs-kwaliteit! ANC prima, bediening prima. Zoek je een betaalbare en goede set, dan is dit je keus.

name: Soundcore P31i by Anker, Real-Time Adaptive Noise Cancelling, Hi-Res Sound, Translation Earbuds, 50H Playtime, Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth Earphones, Spatial Audio, Fast Charging, IP55 (Light Blue)
highlights: Real-Time Adaptive Noise Cancelling: Advanced ANC reduces noise by up to 52 dB. Adaptive technology detects your surroundings and automatically chooses the best noise-cancelling level for you

Hi-Res Certified Sound with LDAC: Experience stunning, lossless Hi-Fi audio. Powered by LDAC, and Hi-Res Audio, these noise-cancelling earbuds reproduce musical nuances, delivering rich, well-balanced treble and bass.
Real-Time 100+ AI Translation: Communicate effortlessly in over 100 languages. AI instantly translates speech with high accuracy, keeping conversations smooth and natural.

6 AI-Enhanced Mics for Clear Calls: Six microphones work with an AI noise reduction algorithm to separate your voice from background noise. The wind-noise reduction algorithm keeps calls clear even outdoors.

Ultra-Long Playtime & Fast Charging: Enjoy up to 10 hours of playtime on a single charge (50 hours with the case). Even with ANC on, get 8 hours per charge and 40 hours total. A quick 10-minute charge gives 3.5 hours of listening.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 31, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body: Revised review: Man I have to come back and fix this. I was having a lot of connection problems at the beginning and I realized in my very busy day-to-day life that the problem was on my end. I wasn't giving it time to set up You have to set it up and connect it Make sure your firmware is updated that one time and once you do this will be some of the best earbuds you've ever owned. The connectivity is excellent The battery life is unbelievably good. I withdraw any previous criticisms when I was extremely stressed out and doing three things at the same time very busy with a lot of things and I hadn't done everything I was supposed to do while setting it up which only takes actually just a little bit. Download the app integrate it Make sure the firmware is updated on your first use takes just a couple of minutes and they have excellent sound quality the base is deep The microphone capability sounds great I use it while gaming it connects to my switch 2 it is a dream. When I put them back in the case they disconnect and when you put them back in they automatically fire right up. You don't even have to go back and forth to the app but I do because all of the sound options like transparent mode sound filtering and the noise cancellation is great I've never had it ear pair of earbuds that's done this but the technology is quite astonishing. Very happy with this and I apologize and withdrawal my previous criticism as I hadn't fully set it up yet so that's on me.

-MOST IMPORTANT OF ALL- The sound quality is simply unparalleled as far as Bluetooth buds go. I would buy these for $200 without question. The EQ makes it so no matter your preference, you can tweak the sound to exactly how you like it. The fidelity, clarity, bass, highs, vocals, etc all shine.

This is one of the best purchases I have made in years and could not be more pleased

reviews.date: Reviewed in Brazil on March 28, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body: A experiência de áudio em músicas, filmes e jogos (neste ressalta as passadas e os tiros, além da direção deles, em jogo de FPS) é excelente com ótimo custo-benefício, ativei o LDAC e defini a maior taxa de banda de áudio nas opções de desenvolvedor do celular, além de ativar no App Soundcore. Só não gostei porque, diferente do P41i, quando ativa para jogos perde a conexão dupla, podendo conectar em 1 dispositivo apenas. A redução de ruído é maior que no P41i, além de ter opção de história pra dormir (em inglês) e mais opções de ruído branco... Não calculei o tempo médio que demora uma carga, mas já passei um dia inteiro e à noite às vezes no ouvido sem carregar e sem sentir desconforto no encaixe da orelha também. Estou muito, mas muito, satisfeito com esse fone. Super recomendo!!

reviews.body:
Tiene buen sonido relacionado precio- calidad, la cancelación de sonido es un 90% efectiva (aún no la he probado en exteriores), la batería también es buena al menos aguanta mi horario de 8hrs en oficina, son cómodos, la IA de traducción es un plus muy bueno y la app en general es bastante amigable… Llevo usándolo cerca de una semana y media y me están gustando mucho.

Lo único que podría mejorar es que no puedes conectarlo a dos dispositivos al mismo tiempo y el nivel de pila solo puedes verlo en la app o en el reproductor de música.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 30, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
The S66 wireless earbuds are a practical and budget-friendly option for anyone looking to enjoy the convenience of a cable-free experience. Their in-ear design with a stem provides a comfortable and secure fit, making them suitable for everyday use at home, work, or during light activities.

One of their standout features is the charging case with a digital display, which shows the battery level of both the case and each earbud (L and R). This is especially useful, as it allows you to easily keep track of when it’s time to recharge.

In terms of sound quality, the S66 earbuds deliver decent performance, with clear vocals and acceptable bass. While they may not compete with premium brands, they are more than sufficient for casual listening.

Bluetooth connectivity is generally quick and stable, allowing for easy pairing with smartphones and other devices. Battery life is also reliable, offering several hours of continuous playback, along with additional charges from the case.

reviews.date: Reviewed in France on October 15, 2023
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
Acheté pour un ami fin décembre 2022 car ces AirPods Pro ne marchaient plus. Il les utilisent depuis presque un an et il en est très satisfait. Écouteur de très bonne qualité. Bon rapport qualité-prix. Bon son. Très bonne autonomie. Le Bluetooth se connecte très facilement autant a un iPhone qu’à un autre téléphone (exemple redmi), déjà testé avec ces téléphones la. Une fois que le Bluetooth est connecté, les écouteurs se connectent seul au téléphone. Seul bémol c’est qu’ils sont très sensibles et lorsqu’on les touche pour les remettre en place cela raccroche la communication téléphonique.
Je conseille pour les personnes qui ne veulent pas s’acheter de écouteurs Apple au vu du prix. Cela sont un bon compromis.

reviews.date: Reviewed in Germany on November 21, 2022
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
Habe jetzt die Kopfhörer fast im täglichen Einsatz. 24 Stunden Lieferung hat problemlos geklappt. Nun zum Grund weshalb ich mich für den Kopfhörer entschieden habe, Bluetooth wird ohne Passwort aufgebaut man benötigt keine extra App die man installieren muss. Nun zum Tragegefühl. Ich habe verhältnismäßig kleine Ohren und schon einige Kopfhörer getestet, die entweder unangenehm gedrückt haben im Gehörgang oder keinen guten Halt hatten und ständig herausgefallen sind. Auch hier bin ich positiv überrascht. Ich spüre die Kopfhörer so gut wie gar nicht. Leicht schräg eingesetzt und dann nach unten drehen, so sitzen sie dann auch fest genug. Jetzt zum Klang. Klang ist Geschmackssache, daher habe ich in der Equalizer Funktion des Smartphones meinen individuellen Klang eingestellt und abgespeichert. Der Bass ist absolut ausreichend, die Höhen übersteuern nicht, auch wenn es mal lauter zur Sache geht. Ich höre von Metal bis RnB eigentlich alles und in jeder Musikrichtung hören sich die Kopfhörer ausgewogen an. Die Bedienung über die touch Einstellung ist intuitiv leider liegt hier mein einziger Kritikpunkt, um die Lautstärke lauter und leiser zu stellen muss man (3x kurz) antippen, dann wird die Lautstärke um eine Stufe erhöht oder verringert. Wenn man hier alle Stufen von ganz leise bis ganz laut durchgedrückt hat, muss man doch einige Klicks durchgeführt. Da ist es einfacher am Handy die Lautstärke über mehrere Stufen zu erhöhen. Wenn eine oder zwei Stufe höher gestellt werden soll sind die 3 Klicks ok. Die Sprachqualität ist gut, das haben mir zumindest meine Gesprächspartner bestätigt. Neben Tragegefühl und Klang ist als drittes die Akkulaufzeit entscheidend. Hier kann ich die Angabe des Herstellers bestätigen. Mein Fazit: absolute Kaufempfehlung.

reviews.date: Reviewed in France on October 15, 2023
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
Acheté pour un ami fin décembre 2022 car ces AirPods Pro ne marchaient plus. Il les utilisent depuis presque un an et il en est très satisfait. Écouteur de très bonne qualité. Bon rapport qualité-prix. Bon son. Très bonne autonomie. Le Bluetooth se connecte très facilement autant a un iPhone qu’à un autre téléphone (exemple redmi), déjà testé avec ces téléphones la. Une fois que le Bluetooth est connecté, les écouteurs se connectent seul au téléphone. Seul bémol c’est qu’ils sont très sensibles et lorsqu’on les touche pour les remettre en place cela raccroche la communication téléphonique.
Je conseille pour les personnes qui ne veulent pas s’acheter de écouteurs Apple au vu du prix. Cela sont un bon compromis.

reviews.date: Reviewed in Germany on November 21, 2022
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
Habe jetzt die Kopfhörer fast im täglichen Einsatz. 24 Stunden Lieferung hat problemlos geklappt. Nun zum Grund weshalb ich mich für den Kopfhörer entschieden habe, Bluetooth wird ohne Passwort aufgebaut man benötigt keine extra App die man installieren muss. Nun zum Tragegefühl. Ich habe verhältnismäßig kleine Ohren und schon einige Kopfhörer getestet, die entweder unangenehm gedrückt haben im Gehörgang oder keinen guten Halt hatten und ständig herausgefallen sind. Auch hier bin ich positiv überrascht. Ich spüre die Kopfhörer so gut wie gar nicht. Leicht schräg eingesetzt und dann nach unten drehen, so sitzen sie dann auch fest genug. Jetzt zum Klang. Klang ist Geschmackssache, daher habe ich in der Equalizer Funktion des Smartphones meinen individuellen Klang eingestellt und abgespeichert. Der Bass ist absolut ausreichend, die Höhen übersteuern nicht, auch wenn es mal lauter zur Sache geht. Ich höre von Metal bis RnB eigentlich alles und in jeder Musikrichtung hören sich die Kopfhörer ausgewogen an. Die Bedienung über die touch Einstellung ist intuitiv leider liegt hier mein einziger Kritikpunkt, um die Lautstärke lauter und leiser zu stellen muss man (3x kurz) antippen, dann wird die Lautstärke um eine Stufe erhöht oder verringert. Wenn man hier alle Stufen von ganz leise bis ganz laut durchgedrückt hat, muss man doch einige Klicks durchgeführt. Da ist es einfacher am Handy die Lautstärke über mehrere Stufen zu erhöhen. Wenn eine oder zwei Stufe höher gestellt werden soll sind die 3 Klicks ok. Die Sprachqualität ist gut, das haben mir zumindest meine Gesprächspartner bestätigt. Neben Tragegefühl und Klang ist als drittes die Akkulaufzeit entscheidend. Hier kann ich die Angabe des Herstellers bestätigen. Mein Fazit: absolute Kaufempfehlung.

reviews.body: Per il prezzo pagato, ottime cuffie

name: XIAOWTEK Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones with 50H Playback, Deep Bass Stereo Ear Buds Clear Calls with LED Power Display, Light Green
highlights: 50 Hrs Playtime and Dual LED Display: Each earbud lasts up to 8 hours on a single charge, and up to 50 hours of playback with the charging case, giving you an exceptional long-lasting experience. In addition, the in-ear wireless Bluetooth headphones are equipped with a smart LED display that visually shows the power level

Bluetooth 5.4 and One Step Auto-Prairiing: The wireless earbuds utilize the latest Bluetooth 5.4 technology for more stable transmission and longer range, providing you with an uninterrupted call and music experience. After the first pairing, simply remove both wireless earbuds from the charging case and they will pair automatically

Superior Sound Quality and Clear Calls: The S66 Bluetooth wireless headphone with 13.4 mm graphene diaphragm delivers powerful bass, clear mids and bright highs, and ear buds with dual hybrid ENC microphones passively eliminates 85% of background noise for clearer calls

Smart Touch and IP7 Waterproof: The smart touch control of the headphones can perfectly fulfill your daily needs and bring more convenience to your life.Meanwhile, Bluetooth earphones have IP7 waterproof rating to withstand sweat, rain and light splashes, making them suitable for wearing while exercising and running

Comfort Fit and Lightweight: The S66 Bluetooth headphone and the charging case are compact and lightweight with a lanyard attached. It's small enough to slip in your pocket, or clip on your bag or keys–so you never worry about space. In addition, each in-ear earbud weighs only 4 grams, making it easy to wear for long periods of time

reviews.body: I bought these True Wireless stereo earbuds taking their price point into consideration, and honestly, they have worked really well right from the very first use. The connectivity is easy and stable, and the sound quality is excellent for both listening to music and making calls. Furthermore, they are comfortable and secure, staying firmly in place even while you are on the move; plus, their noise cancellation is effective, reducing ambient sound to provide a superior listening experience. Additionally, the battery life is impressive, and the charging case is practical and easy to carry. All in all, they are highly recommended for daily use.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 30, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
The S66 wireless earbuds are a practical and budget-friendly option for anyone looking to enjoy the convenience of a cable-free experience. Their in-ear design with a stem provides a comfortable and secure fit, making them suitable for everyday use at home, work, or during light activities.

One of their standout features is the charging case with a digital display, which shows the battery level of both the case and each earbud (L and R). This is especially useful, as it allows you to easily keep track of when it’s time to recharge.

In terms of sound quality, the S66 earbuds deliver decent performance, with clear vocals and acceptable bass. While they may not compete with premium brands, they are more than sufficient for casual listening.

Bluetooth connectivity is generally quick and stable, allowing for easy pairing with smartphones and other devices. Battery life is also reliable, offering several hours of continuous playback, along with additional charges from the case.
