reviews.date: Reviewed in Germany on November 21, 2022
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
Habe jetzt die Kopfhörer fast im täglichen Einsatz. 24 Stunden Lieferung hat problemlos geklappt. Nun zum Grund weshalb ich mich für den Kopfhörer entschieden habe, Bluetooth wird ohne Passwort aufgebaut man benötigt keine extra App die man installieren muss. Nun zum Tragegefühl. Ich habe verhältnismäßig kleine Ohren und schon einige Kopfhörer getestet, die entweder unangenehm gedrückt haben im Gehörgang oder keinen guten Halt hatten und ständig herausgefallen sind. Auch hier bin ich positiv überrascht. Ich spüre die Kopfhörer so gut wie gar nicht. Leicht schräg eingesetzt und dann nach unten drehen, so sitzen sie dann auch fest genug. Jetzt zum Klang. Klang ist Geschmackssache, daher habe ich in der Equalizer Funktion des Smartphones meinen individuellen Klang eingestellt und abgespeichert. Der Bass ist absolut ausreichend, die Höhen übersteuern nicht, auch wenn es mal lauter zur Sache geht. Ich höre von Metal bis RnB eigentlich alles und in jeder Musikrichtung hören sich die Kopfhörer ausgewogen an. Die Bedienung über die touch Einstellung ist intuitiv leider liegt hier mein einziger Kritikpunkt, um die Lautstärke lauter und leiser zu stellen muss man (3x kurz) antippen, dann wird die Lautstärke um eine Stufe erhöht oder verringert. Wenn man hier alle Stufen von ganz leise bis ganz laut durchgedrückt hat, muss man doch einige Klicks durchgeführt. Da ist es einfacher am Handy die Lautstärke über mehrere Stufen zu erhöhen. Wenn eine oder zwei Stufe höher gestellt werden soll sind die 3 Klicks ok. Die Sprachqualität ist gut, das haben mir zumindest meine Gesprächspartner bestätigt. Neben Tragegefühl und Klang ist als drittes die Akkulaufzeit entscheidend. Hier kann ich die Angabe des Herstellers bestätigen. Mein Fazit: absolute Kaufempfehlung.
Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on January 18, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
Edit/update! 1/29/2026. Raycon contacted me and offered a full refund! Either someone actually reads the comments or it's AI, either way, I was shocked! I am really glad that they reached out and offered a refund. I will keep my hopes up that they look into the issues and maybe update the contact method. I really wanted to believe that I got a dud pair and now I am more convinced that it is what happened. I am changing the 2 star to 5, if anyone cares, haha. There is room for improvement. However, with their response to the issue, and the sound quality and price previously mentioned, I am pleased. Seems like they genuinely want to satisfy the consumer. Thank you Raycon!

[original comment below]
The original ones i had were awesome, however they were stolen. I bought a second pair, they were great for about 8 months, then they had charging issues and basically had half the promised battery life when they did actually charge. These new ones (3rd pair, Classic) keep disconnecting and nobody can hear me on phone calls, I drive a lot for work so I need hands free and these aren't cutting it when customers cannot hear me and I have to switch to speaker phone, or just call them back, not a great impression. And it's always an s show trying to get customer support, you have to jump through a bunch of hoops, this pertains to almost any company out there, not just Raycon. I really wanted to like them. Battery life, sound quality and price are top notch, but that's all worthless if they keep disconnecting and nobody can hear you. It seems that quality control is lacking and it's just a focus on sales numbers which is unfortunate for the consumer.
Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 8, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

I absolutely love these earbuds! The sound quality is great, and the noise-canceling mode is seriously amazing—it blocks out so much background noise and makes listening so much more enjoyable.

I wear them at work while boarding dogs, so they go through a lot of movement and roughhousing—and they stay put! They come with multiple ear tip sizes, which made it easy to find the perfect fit. Best of all, NO ear fatigue, even after wearing them for long periods.

They’re super comfortable, easy to use, and stay in place really well. The battery life is solid, and I love that the carrying case also charges them and holds a charge for a few days. They’re sleek and subtle too—you can barely notice them at first glance.

I even did a full “head shake test” while grooming dogs because I didn’t want them falling into the tub, and they didn’t budge at all.

I would buy these over and over again—definitely worth it! Highly recommend!!!
Read more

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 1, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I have this amazing ability to lose earbuds. I also have this belief that the more you spend the better the bud.
However, having lost a pair of expensive JBLs, I turned to these after reading the reviews.
They live up to the hype!
They are outstanding.
The sound quality is unparalleled in my experience and they fit my ear perfectly. I will never have to worry about these disappearing from my ear at the gym or, and this is a MAJOR plus, snagging on my swearshirt if I take it off during a workout.
They actually sit IN the ear canal and don't have those ridiculous little stick thingies that emanate from the bottom of most earbuds.
I have big giant Dumbo ears (sad story) , but they come with an array of ear pieces to help fit anyone snugly.
When I lose these, and history does tend to repeat itself in that regard for me, I will buy another pair and will STILL have paid less for the single pair of JBLs.
Great buy!
Very fair price!
Excellent quality!
Treat yourself, and with the cash you save take the fam to dinner!
Read more

These new ones (3rd pair, Classic) keep disconnecting and nobody can hear me on phone calls, I drive a lot for work so I need hands free and these aren't cutting it when customers cannot hear me and I have to switch to speaker phone, or just call them back, not a great impression. And it's always an s show trying to get customer support, you have to jump through a bunch of hoops, this pertains to almost any company out there, not just Raycon. I really wanted to like them. Battery life, sound quality and price are top notch, but that's all worthless if they keep disconnecting and nobody can hear you. It seems that quality control is lacking and it's just a focus on sales numbers which is unfortunate for the consumer.

I would buy these over and over again—definitely worth it! Highly recommend!!!

I have this amazing ability to lose earbuds. I also have this belief that the more you spend the better the bud.
However, having lost a pair of expensive JBLs, I turned to these after reading the reviews.
They live up to the hype!
They are outstanding.
The sound quality is unparalleled in my experience and they fit my ear perfectly. I will never have to worry about these disappearing from my ear at the gym or, and this is a MAJOR plus, snagging on my swearshirt if I take it off during a workout.
They actually sit IN the ear canal and don't have those ridiculous little stick thingies that emanate from the bottom of most earbuds.
I have big giant Dumbo ears (sad story) , but they come with an array of ear pieces to help fit anyone snugly.
When I lose these, and history does tend to repeat itself in that regard for me, I will buy another pair and will STILL have paid less for the single pair of JBLs.
Great buy!
Very fair price!
Excellent quality!
Treat yourself, and with the cash you save take the fam to dinner!

name: Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones Bass Stereo, Ear Buds with Noise Cancelling Mic, LED Display in Ear Earphones Clear Calls, IP7 Waterproof Bluetooth Earbuds for Phones/Sports/Laptop, White
highlights: 2026 Bluetooth 5.4 Technology : The wireless earbuds use the bluetooth 5.4 chipset. There is a faster and more stable signal transmission and has successfully achieved low latency without interruption. With a range of up to 15 m, whether you are at home, in the office, or on the road, you don't have to worry about disconnection of the bluetooth earbuds. Automatic pairing & compatible with multiple devices.

More Outstanding ENC Noise Reduction: Powered by dual 14.2 mm low-distortion composite dynamic drivers and a built-in high-resolution decoder, these wireless headphones deliver immersive, high-fidelity sound with AAC and SBC support.Advanced ENC call noise cancellation ensures crystal-clear voice quality, even in noisy environments—bringing you a truly elevated audio experience with the A90 noise-cancelling earbuds.

LED Power Display & Easy Touch Control: The smart LED display keeps you informed of the remaining battery of both the charging case and wireless earphones, giving you full control over your listening time wherever you go. Simply tap the earbuds wireless bluetooth to control music playback, manage calls, or wake your voice assistant—hands-free convenience, no phone needed.

36 Hours Playtime & Faster Charging: Enjoy 6–8 hours of uninterrupted listening on one charge, with up to 36 hours of total battery life when used with the charging case. The Type-C fast charging design delivers safer, more efficient power, keeping your noise cancelling headphones ready whenever you need them.

Ergonomic & IP7 Waterproof: Thanks to an ultra-light nano coating, these true wireless earbuds are IP7 waterproof and dustproof—perfect for workouts or outdoor adventures. The ergonomic in-ear design and soft silicone tips provide a secure, comfortable fit while keeping outside noise out, letting you immerse yourself fully in your music.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 20, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I love these earbuds! They have a silicone tip which is far more comfortable than the AirPods. They fit snugly and block out other noise. They paired easily and quickly to my TV.

The case shows a clear battery charge indicator so there is no guesswork about whether they are charged or not. I wore them all night, they didn’t lose their charge and when I put them in the case this morning, it showed they are still charged at 93%! I prefer the sound quality as well.

You can’t beat their inexpensive price. I bought a second set to keep in my purse for roadtrips, airplane rides, waiting rooms, hospital visits, etc. I have yet to use any of the other features but I’m sure they must also be great. You can’t go wrong with these earbuds! Apple should pay attention and upgrade their AirPods to this level.

reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I recently purchased the Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones in white, and I am incredibly impressed with their performance. These earbuds deserve a solid 5-star rating!

The sound quality is exceptional, with deep bass and clear treble, making music and calls a pleasure. The noise-canceling microphone works wonderfully, ensuring my calls are crystal-clear even in busy environments. I really love the LED display, which makes it easy to check battery levels at a glance.

The IP7 waterproof rating is perfect for workouts and outdoor activities, and the fit is comfortable enough to wear for hours. Pairing with my phone and laptop was seamless, and Bluetooth 5.4 delivers a stable connection without interruptions.

Overall, these earbuds provide an excellent combination of performance, comfort, and reliability. Highly recommended for anyone seeking quality wireless headphones!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 7, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body: Don’t waste your money on Apple AirPods!! These are BETTER!!!! My AirPods recently broke and I didn’t want to spend another $300+ on a new pair, so I figured I’d just get these for now. But I was not expected them to be this good of quality for such an affordable price. I have a cleaning business and so I use headphones every single day for at least 2-5 hours straight and my AirPods use to die SO FAST. Even if I charged the case over night. I have had these headphones for at least 4-5 days now, haven’t charged them once and the battery life is still at 80%. They also fit so much better in my ears, AirPods always felt loose and would fall out with too much movement (at least for me) but these fit so much better. The case is very good quality as well. I rarely used both AirPods in both ears so I didn’t really use the noise cancellation too much, but these have a very similar volume and quality of sound. Cannot recommend enough!!!!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 14, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
This set is designed and assembled very well and a good value. I like that the display shows the state of charge as a graph for each earbud. WiFi signal sensitivity and range is excellent and it pairs reliably (although it announces "Connected" too fast after removal from the case to hear it. They have very low digital artifacts and an inaudible noise level in the amplifiers.
It's important to note that these earbuds have a strong "V" shaped tone, that is, the high and low ends of the audio spectrum are boosted strongly, compared to the midrange. Great if you want those boosts but it's not an accurate response - I need to use an app in my phone and tablet to correct the high boost.
The low end is quite extended - to deeper low sounds than any other earbuds I own. Fortunately, that does not extend to higher bass frequencies and make the low end "tubby". Put simply, if you like very boosted lows and highs these are good earbuds.

reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body: These work great! The sound quality is extremely good. The color of the green one is exact. I bought a second pair for my boyfriend especially since these were affordable. The battery life is longer than my Beats. Also these feel comfortable in my ears with no problem. Def worth it

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 3, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I'm a simple guy. I like earbuds that are cheap, loud and have decent noise cancelling. And any earbuds like this will do just that. You don't have to spend $25-$40 for something exactly the same as these but have better reviews. Remember that things are user based. 1 user may have a bad experience while another will have a great experience.
--
Connection: If you've ever had ANY kind of earbuds like this, its the exact same. A90 earbuds will show up in Bluetooth and you connect and you're good to go. Literally plug and play.
--
Accessories: you get your earbuds, the case and a few extra silicone ear pieces to fit your ears. Standard and simple.
--
Responsiveness: Easy and simple.
--
Charging case and earbuds: Both are relatively fast. All depends on how much you use them but a full case charge will last about a week of 8 hours a day of use.
--
Voice: This one has a European voice start up where other ones I've had, had an AI Asian voice start up. If that's ehat you're into then you'll be fine with this pair.
--
All in all I am very satisfied with my purchase. I bought a silicone case for these so they can last longer. I highly recommend to do the same because as good as these types of buds are, the cases aren't all that durable. 2-3 drops from 3+ feet will damage your cases so keep that in mind.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on February 7, 2024
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
So to be fair, I really didn’t expect much for the low price point of these. There are very expensive earbuds on the market but I wanted something affordable for my husband to use as to be honest I wasn’t sure how well he would look after them or how much he would use them.

So looking around, these seem to have good feedback and I decided to get them figuring that if they didn’t work out, I hadn’t spent fortune and if they did work out, he could always indulge in a more expensive set further down the line.

Firstly I have to say the battery life on these are amazing. He uses them every day when he’s at work to listen to music if he has a period of time where he doesn’t need to listen out for anyone, he uses them when he walks the dog and he also uses the most evenings for about an hour to watch TV on his phone or a film whilst I’m watching something different. He’s used them every day since Christmas day and as I write this on the 7th of February, he’s only charged the entire pack once. The battery life is just amazing on these which is a real plus as I expected them to drain down instantly after one use.

They are very comfortable to wear in your ear, some can be quite uncomfortable but the shape of these mean that they sit in your ear very comfortably and can be worn for a reasonable amount of time before causing discomfort.

The case display shows the battery when you open the pack to show you how much life is left in the earbuds.

Probably the only criticism is that there is the light on the side of them that flashes, but I must admit that I am noticed that as I took them out of the packet to take a photo for this review so evidently the light is not that bright that it’s ever caught my attention in the last month.

I haven’t used them myself, but he assures me that the sound quality is brilliant. He likes to watch war movies which quite often have very bass-y soundtracks and lots of loud bombs and similar and he says that it’s all sounds brilliant and doesn’t sound tinny or cheap quality.

When he has his earphones in, he doesn’t seem to be able to hear me. If I talk or I’m watching something in the background, he says that he can’t hear it so noise cancellation in these is pretty top quality too

I honestly think these are the best set of headphones I’ve purchased for him and it’s certainly something I would consider in the future if my daughter wanted a pair because they are so much cheaper than branded ones but do an amazing job.

They were super easy to connect to his phone and can easily be connected to a different phone just using Bluetooth.

100% recommend!

This set is designed and assembled very well and a good value. I like that the display shows the state of charge as a graph for each earbud. WiFi signal sensitivity and range is excellent and it pairs reliably (although it announces "Connected" too fast after removal from the case to hear it. They have very low digital artifacts and an inaudible noise level in the amplifiers.
It's important to note that these earbuds have a strong "V" shaped tone, that is, the high and low ends of the audio spectrum are boosted strongly, compared to the midrange. Great if you want those boosts but it's not an accurate response - I need to use an app in my phone and tablet to correct the high boost.
The low end is quite extended - to deeper low sounds than any other earbuds I own. Fortunately, that does not extend to higher bass frequencies and make the low end "tubby". Put simply, if you like very boosted lows and highs these are good earbuds.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 3, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I'm a simple guy. I like earbuds that are cheap, loud and have decent noise cancelling. And any earbuds like this will do just that. You don't have to spend $25-$40 for something exactly the same as these but have better reviews. Remember that things are user based. 1 user may have a bad experience while another will have a great experience.
--
Connection: If you've ever had ANY kind of earbuds like this, its the exact same. A90 earbuds will show up in Bluetooth and you connect and you're good to go. Literally plug and play.
--
Accessories: you get your earbuds, the case and a few extra silicone ear pieces to fit your ears. Standard and simple.
--
Responsiveness: Easy and simple.
--
Charging case and earbuds: Both are relatively fast. All depends on how much you use them but a full case charge will last about a week of 8 hours a day of use.
--
Voice: This one has a European voice start up where other ones I've had, had an AI Asian voice start up. If that's ehat you're into then you'll be fine with this pair.
--
All in all I am very satisfied with my purchase. I bought a silicone case for these so they can last longer. I highly recommend to do the same because as good as these types of buds are, the cases aren't all that durable. 2-3 drops from 3+ feet will damage your cases so keep that in mind.

I bought a pair of these as a gift because she was tired of how quickly her preferred brand's earbuds (Jlab) break down. reviews.date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on February 7, 2024
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
So to be fair, I really didn’t expect much for the low price point of these. There are very expensive earbuds on the market but I wanted something affordable for my husband to use as to be honest I wasn’t sure how well he would look after them or how much he would use them.

So looking around, these seem to have good feedback and I decided to get them figuring that if they didn’t work out, I hadn’t spent fortune and if they did work out, he could always indulge in a more expensive set further down the line.

Firstly I have to say the battery life on these are amazing. He uses them every day when he’s at work to listen to music if he has a period of time where he doesn’t need to listen out for anyone, he uses them when he walks the dog and he also uses the most evenings for about an hour to watch TV on his phone or a film whilst I’m watching something different. He’s used them every day since Christmas day and as I write this on the 7th of February, he’s only charged the entire pack once. The battery life is just amazing on these which is a real plus as I expected them to drain down instantly after one use.

They are very comfortable to wear in your ear, some can be quite uncomfortable but the shape of these mean that they sit in your ear very comfortably and can be worn for a reasonable amount of time before causing discomfort.

The case display shows the battery when you open the pack to show you how much life is left in the earbuds.

Probably the only criticism is that there is the light on the side of them that flashes, but I must admit that I am noticed that as I took them out of the packet to take a photo for this review so evidently the light is not that bright that it’s ever caught my attention in the last month.

I haven’t used them myself, but he assures me that the sound quality is brilliant. He likes to watch war movies which quite often have very bass-y soundtracks and lots of loud bombs and similar and he says that it’s all sounds brilliant and doesn’t sound tinny or cheap quality.

When he has his earphones in, he doesn’t seem to be able to hear me. If I talk or I’m watching something in the background, he says that he can’t hear it so noise cancellation in these is pretty top quality too

I honestly think these are the best set of headphones I’ve purchased for him and it’s certainly something I would consider in the future if my daughter wanted a pair because they are so much cheaper than branded ones but do an amazing job.

They were super easy to connect to his phone and can easily be connected to a different phone just using Bluetooth.

100% recommend!
Read more

name: Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones Bass Stereo, Ear Buds with Noise Cancelling Mic, LED Display in Ear Earphones Clear Calls, IP7 Waterproof Bluetooth Earbuds for Laptop/Phones/Sports, Blue
availability: FREE delivery May 21 - June 17 to Philippines on eligible orders over PHP 3,010.07
highlights: 2025 Bluetooth 5.4 Technology : The wireless earbuds use the bluetooth 5.4 chipset. There is a faster and more stable signal transmission and has successfully achieved low latency without interruption. With a range of up to 15 m, whether you are at home, in the office, or on the road, you don't have to worry about disconnection of the bluetooth earbuds. Automatic pairing & compatible with multiple devices.

More Outstanding ENC Noise Reduction : The wireless headphones adopts dual 14.2mm low-distortion composite dynamic drivers with high resolution decoder built-in and AAC&SBC audio coding technology. In addition, the ENC calling noise cancellation technology brings a clearer sound to your calls, giving you a whole better feeling, everything from the A90 noise cancelling earbuds.

LED Power Display : The LED display on the charging case shows you the charge level of the case as well as the wireless earphones, so you can precisely control the charge level of your headphones wireless for your convenience on the go. Simply tap on the earbuds wireless bluetooth to skip songs, play/pause music, answer/hang up phone calls, activate voice assistant, all without taking out your phone.

36 Hours and Faster Charging: The bluetooth earphones offer up to 6-8 hours of usage on a single charge, with the charging case supporting up to 30 hours of usage, ensuring all-day usage. The wireless bluetooth headphones feature a Type-C charging port, providing a more stable and secure charging method, and significantly extending the battery life of the noise cancelling headphones.

Ergonomic IP7 Waterproof Design : With ultra-light Nano coating, the headphones with mic reach IP7 waterproof grade, dust and rain proof, the extreme lightness, the in-ear design in line with the shape of human ears, and the softer silicone ear cap, make you feel comfortable in any scene and can only hear your own music, all from this true wireless ear buds.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 20, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I love these earbuds! They have a silicone tip which is far more comfortable than the AirPods. They fit snugly and block out other noise. They paired easily and quickly to my TV.

The case shows a clear battery charge indicator so there is no guesswork about whether they are charged or not. I wore them all night, they didn’t lose their charge and when I put them in the case this morning, it showed they are still charged at 93%! I prefer the sound quality as well.

You can’t beat their inexpensive price. I bought a second set to keep in my purse for roadtrips, airplane rides, waiting rooms, hospital visits, etc. I have yet to use any of the other features but I’m sure they must also be great. You can’t go wrong with these earbuds! Apple should pay attention and upgrade their AirPods to this level.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 17, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I recently purchased the Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones in white, and I am incredibly impressed with their performance. These earbuds deserve a solid 5-star rating!

The sound quality is exceptional, with deep bass and clear treble, making music and calls a pleasure. The noise-canceling microphone works wonderfully, ensuring my calls are crystal-clear even in busy environments. I really love the LED display, which makes it easy to check battery levels at a glance.

The IP7 waterproof rating is perfect for workouts and outdoor activities, and the fit is comfortable enough to wear for hours. Pairing with my phone and laptop was seamless, and Bluetooth 5.4 delivers a stable connection without interruptions.

Overall, these earbuds provide an excellent combination of performance, comfort, and reliability. Highly recommended for anyone seeking quality wireless headphones!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 7, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body: Don’t waste your money on Apple AirPods!! These are BETTER!!!! My AirPods recently broke and I didn’t want to spend another $300+ on a new pair, so I figured I’d just get these for now. But I was not expected them to be this good of quality for such an affordable price. I have a cleaning business and so I use headphones every single day for at least 2-5 hours straight and my AirPods use to die SO FAST. Even if I charged the case over night. I have had these headphones for at least 4-5 days now, haven’t charged them once and the battery life is still at 80%. They also fit so much better in my ears, AirPods always felt loose and would fall out with too much movement (at least for me) but these fit so much better. The case is very good quality as well. I rarely used both AirPods in both ears so I didn’t really use the noise cancellation too much, but these have a very similar volume and quality of sound. Cannot recommend enough!!!!

name: Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones Bass Stereo, Ear Buds with Noise Cancelling Mic, LED Display in Ear Earphones Clear Calls, IP7 Waterproof Bluetooth Earbuds for Laptop/Phones, Dark Blue
availability: FREE delivery May 19 - June 4 to Philippines on eligible orders over PHP 3,010.07
highlights: 2025 Bluetooth 5.4 Technology : The wireless earbuds use the bluetooth 5.4 chipset. There is a faster and more stable signal transmission and has successfully achieved low latency without interruption. With a range of up to 15 m, whether you are at home, in the office, or on the road, you don't have to worry about disconnection of the bluetooth earbuds. Automatic pairing & compatible with multiple devices.

More Outstanding ENC Noise Reduction : The wireless headphones adopts dual 14.2mm low-distortion composite dynamic drivers with high resolution decoder built-in and AAC&SBC audio coding technology. In addition, the ENC calling noise cancellation technology brings a clearer sound to your calls, giving you a whole better feeling, everything from the A90 noise cancelling earbuds.

LED Power Display : The LED display on the charging case shows you the charge level of the case as well as the wireless earphones, so you can precisely control the charge level of your headphones wireless for your convenience on the go. Simply tap on the earbuds wireless bluetooth to skip songs, play/pause music, answer/hang up phone calls, activate voice assistant, all without taking out your phone.

36 Hours and Faster Charging: The bluetooth earphones offer up to 6-8 hours of usage on a single charge, with the charging case supporting up to 30 hours of usage, ensuring all-day usage. The wireless bluetooth headphones feature a Type-C charging port, providing a more stable and secure charging method, and significantly extending the battery life of the noise cancelling headphones.

Ergonomic IP7 Waterproof Design : With ultra-light Nano coating, the headphones with mic reach IP7 waterproof grade, dust and rain proof, the extreme lightness, the in-ear design in line with the shape of human ears, and the softer silicone ear cap, make you feel comfortable in any scene and can only hear your own music, all from this true wireless ear buds.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 20, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I love these earbuds! They have a silicone tip which is far more comfortable than the AirPods. They fit snugly and block out other noise. They paired easily and quickly to my TV.

The case shows a clear battery charge indicator so there is no guesswork about whether they are charged or not. I wore them all night, they didn’t lose their charge and when I put them in the case this morning, it showed they are still charged at 93%! I prefer the sound quality as well.

You can’t beat their inexpensive price. I bought a second set to keep in my purse for roadtrips, airplane rides, waiting rooms, hospital visits, etc. I have yet to use any of the other features but I’m sure they must also be great. You can’t go wrong with these earbuds! Apple should pay attention and upgrade their AirPods to this level.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 17, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I recently purchased the Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones in white, and I am incredibly impressed with their performance. These earbuds deserve a solid 5-star rating!

The sound quality is exceptional, with deep bass and clear treble, making music and calls a pleasure. The noise-canceling microphone works wonderfully, ensuring my calls are crystal-clear even in busy environments. I really love the LED display, which makes it easy to check battery levels at a glance.

The IP7 waterproof rating is perfect for workouts and outdoor activities, and the fit is comfortable enough to wear for hours. Pairing with my phone and laptop was seamless, and Bluetooth 5.4 delivers a stable connection without interruptions.

Overall, these earbuds provide an excellent combination of performance, comfort, and reliability. Highly recommended for anyone seeking quality wireless headphones!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 7, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body: Don’t waste your money on Apple AirPods!! These are BETTER!!!! My AirPods recently broke and I didn’t want to spend another $300+ on a new pair, so I figured I’d just get these for now. But I was not expected them to be this good of quality for such an affordable price. I have a cleaning business and so I use headphones every single day for at least 2-5 hours straight and my AirPods use to die SO FAST. Even if I charged the case over night. I have had these headphones for at least 4-5 days now, haven’t charged them once and the battery life is still at 80%. They also fit so much better in my ears, AirPods always felt loose and would fall out with too much movement (at least for me) but these fit so much better. The case is very good quality as well. I rarely used both AirPods in both ears so I didn’t really use the noise cancellation too much, but these have a very similar volume and quality of sound. Cannot recommend enough!!!!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 14, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
This set is designed and assembled very well and a good value. I like that the display shows the state of charge as a graph for each earbud. WiFi signal sensitivity and range is excellent and it pairs reliably (although it announces "Connected" too fast after removal from the case to hear it. They have very low digital artifacts and an inaudible noise level in the amplifiers.
It's important to note that these earbuds have a strong "V" shaped tone, that is, the high and low ends of the audio spectrum are boosted strongly, compared to the midrange. Great if you want those boosts but it's not an accurate response - I need to use an app in my phone and tablet to correct the high boost.
The low end is quite extended - to deeper low sounds than any other earbuds I own. Fortunately, that does not extend to higher bass frequencies and make the low end "tubby". Put simply, if you like very boosted lows and highs these are good earbuds.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 3, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I'm a simple guy. I like earbuds that are cheap, loud and have decent noise cancelling. And any earbuds like this will do just that. You don't have to spend $25-$40 for something exactly the same as these but have better reviews. Remember that things are user based. 1 user may have a bad experience while another will have a great experience.
--
Connection: If you've ever had ANY kind of earbuds like this, its the exact same. A90 earbuds will show up in Bluetooth and you connect and you're good to go. Literally plug and play.
--
Accessories: you get your earbuds, the case and a few extra silicone ear pieces to fit your ears. Standard and simple.
--
Responsiveness: Easy and simple.
--
Charging case and earbuds: Both are relatively fast. All depends on how much you use them but a full case charge will last about a week of 8 hours a day of use.
--
Voice: This one has a European voice start up where other ones I've had, had an AI Asian voice start up. If that's ehat you're into then you'll be fine with this pair.
--
All in all I am very satisfied with my purchase. I bought a silicone case for these so they can last longer. I highly recommend to do the same because as good as these types of buds are, the cases aren't all that durable. 2-3 drops from 3+ feet will damage your cases so keep that in mind.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on February 7, 2024
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
So to be fair, I really didn’t expect much for the low price point of these. There are very expensive earbuds on the market but I wanted something affordable for my husband to use as to be honest I wasn’t sure how well he would look after them or how much he would use them.

So looking around, these seem to have good feedback and I decided to get them figuring that if they didn’t work out, I hadn’t spent fortune and if they did work out, he could always indulge in a more expensive set further down the line.

Firstly I have to say the battery life on these are amazing. He uses them every day when he’s at work to listen to music if he has a period of time where he doesn’t need to listen out for anyone, he uses them when he walks the dog and he also uses the most evenings for about an hour to watch TV on his phone or a film whilst I’m watching something different. He’s used them every day since Christmas day and as I write this on the 7th of February, he’s only charged the entire pack once. The battery life is just amazing on these which is a real plus as I expected them to drain down instantly after one use.

They are very comfortable to wear in your ear, some can be quite uncomfortable but the shape of these mean that they sit in your ear very comfortably and can be worn for a reasonable amount of time before causing discomfort.

The case display shows the battery when you open the pack to show you how much life is left in the earbuds.

Probably the only criticism is that there is the light on the side of them that flashes, but I must admit that I am noticed that as I took them out of the packet to take a photo for this review so evidently the light is not that bright that it’s ever caught my attention in the last month.

I haven’t used them myself, but he assures me that the sound quality is brilliant. He likes to watch war movies which quite often have very bass-y soundtracks and lots of loud bombs and similar and he says that it’s all sounds brilliant and doesn’t sound tinny or cheap quality.

When he has his earphones in, he doesn’t seem to be able to hear me. If I talk or I’m watching something in the background, he says that he can’t hear it so noise cancellation in these is pretty top quality too

I honestly think these are the best set of headphones I’ve purchased for him and it’s certainly something I would consider in the future if my daughter wanted a pair because they are so much cheaper than branded ones but do an amazing job.

They were super easy to connect to his phone and can easily be connected to a different phone just using Bluetooth.

100% recommend!

name: Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro (2026) AI True Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds, Hi-Res Audio, 2-Way Speaker, ANC 2.0, Optimized Comfort, IP57, Live Translation, Black [US Version, 2 Yr Warranty]
highlights: EXCEPTIONAL AUDIO: Catch details like never before. Designed with a High-Res Audio¹ 24-bit hi-fi codec, the latest Galaxy earbuds maintain the integrity of your favorite audio over Bluetooth.
TWO-WAY SPEAKER: Enjoy every audio experience to the fullest with two speakers in both Buds, including a tweeter for rich highs and a woofer for deep, full lows.
HD VOICE: Enjoy clear phone calls with Galaxy Buds4 Pro and Galaxy S26 Series² —they work together to deliver crisp and clear conversations.
ANC 2.0: Wherever you go, Adaptive Active Noise Cancellation 2.0³ intelligently adapts in real time to provide stronger, smoother noise cancellation wherever you go.
OPTIMIZED COMFORT: Enjoy that just-right fit, with an improved, ear-hugging design and changeable ear tips.

AI ASSISTANT IN YOUR EAR: Galaxy Buds4 Pro work seamlessly with Galaxy S26 Series to give you AI⁴ help, completely hands-free. Get quick answers and real-time translations delivered straight to your ears —all you have to do is ask.

MADE FOR EVERY MOMENT, RAIN OR SHINE: Peace of mind comes standard with Samsung wireless Galaxy Buds4 Pro, thanks to a water-and dust-resistant design⁵ and an IP57 rating that’s built for life on the go.
description:
Product Description
Audio lovers, the rich listening experience you’ve been waiting for is here with Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro. We’ve pulled out all the stops to craft Buds for those who want to hear the best in every note.
Get closer to the sounds you love with dual speakers in each earbud for a more powerful soundstage. Cue up a track you’ve heard a hundred times. These noise-cancelling ear buds let you hear new details like it’s the first time thanks to a Hi-Res codec¹ that preserves more musical detail than ever before. When you’re finished listening, place them in their redesigned charging case that keeps your Samsung wireless Buds firmly in place while they charge.
Hear the next-level audio experience your heart and ears have been craving with the true wireless Buds4 Pro.
¹Requires initial setup via settings or Samsung Wear app on a compatible Galaxy smartphone; see Samsung.com for compatibility
²Products sold separately.
³Requires initial setup via settings or Samsung Wear app on a compatible Galaxy/Android smartphone; see Samsung.com for compatibility.
⁴Galaxy AI basic features provided by Samsung are free. Any Samsung enhanced AI features and all third-party AI features are subject to different terms and may be subject to fees.
⁵IP-rated for submersion in up to 3 feet of fresh water for up to 30 minutes (charging case is not water-resistant). Not advised for beach or pool use. If the earbuds or your hands are wet, they must be dried thoroughly prior to handling. Damaged earbuds are not guaranteed to be water-resistant.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 31, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
The Galaxy Buds 4 Pro feel like a well-rounded upgrade. Sound quality is the first thing that stands out. The dual speaker setup gives you clear highs and solid low-end without sounding muddy, which makes everything from music to calls sound balanced and detailed.

The noise canceling works well in everyday environments, and the adaptive features adjust without you having to constantly tweak settings. Calls come through clearly thanks to the multiple mic setup, which does a good job isolating your voice.

Build quality feels solid, and the case and buds both have a sturdy, premium feel without being bulky. They sit comfortably and stay in place.

Functionality is strong across the board, especially if you’re using a Samsung device. Overall, it’s a high-quality set of earbuds that justify the price with performance, durability, and smart features.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 22, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
After spending a few days with the Galaxy Buds 4 Pro, the first thing I noticed was the shift in ergonomics. Samsung has clearly spent some time rethinking the shape, as this version sits much more naturally in my ear canal compared to previous generations. They feel secure enough for a long gym session or a brisk walk without that annoying "plugged" sensation that causes ear fatigue after an hour. It’s a subtle change in the casing, but it makes a world of difference for daily wear.

The acoustic profile has definitely taken a leap forward as well. The sound is much more expansive and detailed, especially in the mid range where vocals usually get lost. I’ve been revisiting some of my favorite tracks and picking up on nuances in the production that were a bit muddy on older hardware. The bass is punchy and controlled without being overwhelming, which gives the overall output a very balanced, professional feel that works well for both podcasts and high fidelity music.

Visually, the design has evolved into something much more modern and sleek. The new aesthetic feels more intentional and premium, moving away from the "bean" or bulbous looks of the past. The charging case is pocket friendly and the buds themselves have a refined finish that looks sharp without being flashy. It’s clear that the goal was to create something that looks as good as it performs, and they’ve definitely succeeded in making these feel like a high end piece of tech.

The integration with my Galaxy S26 has been virtually seamless, which is a huge part of why I stick with the ecosystem. The pairing happened almost instantly the moment I opened the lid, and switching between my phone and my laptop is fluid and reliable. Features like the touch controls and noise cancellation are easy to tweak through the wearable app, and the connection remains rock solid even in crowded areas with a lot of interference. It’s a fantastic acquisition for anyone already in the Samsung ecosystem looking for a top tier audio experience.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 25, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I've had the Buds Pro and Buds Pro 2 before purchasing these.
The fit on these are far more comfy than the 1st 2 generations. I have been getting less (practically none) ear fatigue and it actually makes using in ears a more viable option for me when I don'twant to wear over ears. These don't have a tendancy to fall out like my other 2 so that's a great bonus. I travel frequently and the ANC has been good at knocking out background noise from the plane and in airports. Close to what my Sony over ears do.
Sounds quality has been good from what people say when I've spoken to them. Battery life is fine, not nearly as good as my over ears, but I don't expect that to be close.
I wish this thing would be able to seamlessly connect to 2 non-android devices like my Sony over ears but it's not the end of the world.
All in all, I dig it. Good design, comfy wear, good call quality, nice features. Checks the boxes for me. 👍

reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body: These rock! I previously had a set of Sony WF-1000XM4 (puppy chewed one bud) then Sony WF-1000XM5 (lost one bud doing yard work). Decided to give these a try and I'm glad I didn't go with XM6s. The Sonys never fit great with my ear shape and had a tendency to fall out regardless of which size tips I used. The Galaxy Buds fit much better for me and sound fantastic! The sound is crystal clear with articulated accuracy & nuance across the audio spectrum. Bass is superb. They sound better to my ears than the Sonys (and they're cheaper)! The noise canceling works really well. I wear them doing yard work and the sound of the mower, trimmer, weed-wacker, etc. is greatly diminished. I have a Galaxy Flip 6 and the integration with the buds is super easy. I enabled 'find my device' to emit a loud tone if I lose another bud in the yard. I like the swipe volume control right on the buds so I don't have to reach for my phone. Haven't tried the mic yet but so far I really dig these!

name: Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 (2026) AI True Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds + $20 Gift Card, Noise Cancelling, Hi-Res Audio, 1-Way Speaker, New Fit, IP54, Live Translation, White [US Version, 2 Yr Warranty]
highlights: BUNDLE: Prime members get an Amazon Gift Card when you order Samsung Galaxy Buds4. Select the gift card bundle variation for redemption. Gift card may ship separately.
EXCEPTIONAL AUDIO: From small reverbs to subtle textures, catch details like never before with Hi-Res Audio¹ on the latest Galaxy earbuds.
HD VOICE: Enjoy clear phone calls with Galaxy Buds4 and Galaxy S26 Series² —they work together to deliver crisp and clear conversations.
ANC: Wherever you go, Adaptive Active Noise Cancellation³ adjusts sound levels so you can immerse yourself in your favorite audio.
OPTIMIZED COMFORT: Go for longer with a new fit that helps keep your Buds in without needing to adjust or take a break from your listening.

AI ASSISTANT IN YOUR EAR: Galaxy Buds4 work seamlessly with Galaxy S26 Series to give you AI⁴ help, completely hands-free. Get quick answers and real-time translations delivered straight to your ears —all you have to do is ask.
RESISTS SPLASH AND DUST: Rain or shine, Galaxy Buds4 don’t mind. Listen to what you love confidently —a splash-and dust-resistant design⁵ keeps you in your groove wherever the day takes you.
description:
Product Description
Experience the bold sound and all-new fit of Samsung Bluetooth Galaxy Buds4. Built with a 24-bit Hi-Fi codec¹, Buds4 optimizes your audio so you can hear more in your music, podcasts and calls. Keep the beat going anywhere with fewer distractions thanks to Adaptive Active Noise Cancellation³. It automatically adapts to your surroundings to filter out the sounds you don’t want to improve your listening experience. Plus, with refined metallic accents and a secure, redesigned fit that keeps them in place, these Samsung wireless Buds offer a fresh style while keeping you comfortably in the groove throughout the day.
Give your audio and your ears the wow they deserve with the rich, clear sound and sleek look of the true wireless Galaxy Buds4.
¹Requires initial setup via settings or Samsung Wear app on a compatible Galaxy smartphone; see Samsung.com for compatibility.
² Products sold separately.
³ Requires initial setup via settings or Samsung Wear app on a compatible Galaxy/Android smartphone; see Samsung.com for compatibility.
⁴Galaxy AI basic features provided by Samsung are free. Any Samsung enhanced AI features and all third-party AI features are subject to different terms and may be subject to fees.
⁵IP54 —Dust resistant; tested for fresh water splashes from any direction for up to 5 minutes (charging case is not water resistant). Not advised for beach or pool use. If the earbuds or your hands are wet, they must be dried thoroughly prior to handling. Damaged earbuds are not guaranteed to be water resistant.

name: Active Noise Cancelling Wireless Earbuds Bluetooth Headphones 80H Playtime Ear Buds with Power Display Case Hi-Res Sound & Clear Calls Over Ear Hooks Earphones for Sports Running Gym Workout Black
highlights: Adaptive Hybrid Active Noise Cancelling & Clear Calls: blocking up to 99.8% of noise with deep -50dB reduction in just 0.02s. Driven by a high-speed ANC chip and layered sound sensors, these noise cancelling earbuds auto-adjust to planes, subways, offices, and workouts for precision quiet. Switch to Transparency Mode to hear traffic or teammates safely. Multi-mic voice boost and wind-noise control keep every call sharp and clear—ideal for commuters, travelers, remote work, and high-energy days.

80Hrs Battery Life with Power Display Case: Keep your music, calls, and podcasts going through long commutes, intense workouts, or travel adventures. Each earbud provides up to 8 hours per charge, while the 600mAh charging case extends total playtime to an incredible 80 hours. Quick-charge 10 minutes gives 2 hours instantly, and the dual LED display shows real-time battery for both bluetooth headphones and case, so you stay powered and worry-free all day.

Immersive Hi-Res Sound That Moves You: Turn every commute, workout, or home session into a live music experience. These earbuds wireless bluetooth feature certified Hi-Res audio with 13mm dynamic drivers, delivering crisp highs, rich mids, and deep bass for full-spectrum sound. Advanced real-time bass tuning and lossless-quality transmission make every track punch harder while Multi-mic call clarity keeps your voice natural and clear—perfect for daily use, gaming, and streaming.

Effortless Control, Anywhere You Go: Take full command of your music, calls, and playlists without stopping your flow. Physical buttons on these over ear earbuds let you play, pause, skip tracks, adjust volume, and answer calls instantly—even during commutes, workouts, or high-intensity sessions. The wireless charging case with Type-C port ensures quick top-ups anytime, keeping your ear buds powered, responsive, and ready for music, podcasts, or calls all day.

Secure Comfort That Moves With You: Experience all-day stability and comfort with these noise cancelling headphones featuring over-ear hooks and an ergonomic design that keeps your wireless earbuds secure during intense workouts, runs, or outdoor activities. The lightweight, pressure-free fit adapts to every ear shape while maintaining reliable performance in motion. From morning commutes to high-intensity training sessions, enjoy uninterrupted music, clear calls, and confidence with every step.

reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
These earbuds exceeded my expectations! The sound quality is crisp and balanced, with deep bass that doesn’t overpower the mids and highs. The active noise cancellation actually works — it blocks out background noise really well, which makes a huge difference when I’m on calls or just trying to enjoy music without distractions.
They pair quickly with my phone, the Bluetooth connection is stable, and I haven’t experienced any lag or random disconnects. The battery life is solid, and the charging case is compact and easy to carry.
They’re also comfortable enough to wear for long periods without hurting my ears. For the price, you truly can’t beat the quality. I would absolutely buy these again and recommend them to anyone looking for affordable, high-performing wireless earbuds!

Other than full-sized headphones, they are probably the best quality buds I've ever had. WAY better than the JBL over-ear buds. It's not even close. They're super loud. The base is crispy and doesnt crack. I was truly shocked by the quality from the moment I played the first song.

The sound quality is excellent and it’s easy to start and stop music with a push of the button that’s easy to find. The battery life seems very good, and you can see from the charging case exactly how much you you have left. I highly recommend this product to anyone who is quality and value conscious.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 15, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I purchased these looking for an additional set of earbuds, but I got a lot more than I expected.
I had the previous version of these earbuds and they still work great but I was looking for another pair to keep at my office. That when I found these earbuds. I have had them for about 4 weeks now and I’m incredibly happy with my purchase. They’re great for someone who needs earbuds all day long! Whether you’re listening to music at your desk or need something to keep you going during your runs! The over the ear hook helps keep the earbuds in place even during the most intense work outs and when you need to hear you can just pull the ear piece out and still be hands free.
When they noise canceling they mean it! They’re so effective I listen to my music on the lowest settings which helps prevent potential hearing issues and headaches. The single button interface on each ear bud provides a simple easy to use interaction, when on long runs. The buds are snug and have multiple earpieces for your size needs preventing sweat from getting into the ear and loosening, ensuring a tight fit.
I would recommend these for anyone who wants over the ear wireless headphones that have a long lasting battery life!

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 2, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I’m honestly so happy with this purchase. The quality exceeded my expectations right out of the box. Everything feels well-made, sturdy, and thoughtfully designed.

reviews.body: Had these ear buds for over 3 years and they were great. I wore them all the time while relaxing, watching videos, in the gym, on a walk, etc. The battery life is great i would wear these at work for about 8 hours and the battery lasted the whole time and didnt take long to recharge. They recently started to lose their charge after 3+ years dying faster and not charging all the way after being in the case for hours but 3+ years for ear buds less than $30 I did not expect them to last this long. I just put in an order for another pair all other earbuds I find are too big and hurt like crazy after just an hour. 10/10 I would recommend these to anyone. reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on April 14, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I originally bought these while training for a half marathon and needed a designated pair of “running” earbuds since I sweat a lot. I didn’t expect much from a random Amazon pick—but these ended up being one of my best purchases. After over a year of consistent use, they’re still in perfect condition. No loss in sound quality, no issues with connectivity, and they’ve held up really well through workouts, sweat, and daily use. The over-ear hook design is a standout feature. They stay completely secure—no slipping or adjusting mid-run—which makes a huge difference if you’re active. The fit is comfortable and doesn’t feel bulky, even during long runs or gym sessions. Sound quality is also impressive. They get just as loud as my AirPods and have clear, balanced audio whether I’m listening to music or podcasts. I’ve ended up using these way beyond running—at the gym, at work, and just day-to-day.

One small downside: the microphone isn’t the best. People sometimes say I sound a bit fuzzy on calls. That said, I don’t use these much for calls, so it hasn’t been a dealbreaker for me. But overall, if you’re looking for affordable, durable earbuds with a secure fit for workouts or running, these are 100% worth it.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on March 19, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
I bought these ear buds to use while ice skating. I have several ear piercings that prevent me from wearing airpods comfortably, so I opted for these.

PROS:

They are affordable, fit securely, and have no discomfort during use. Additionally, the battery life is long. I’ve had these for over a week now and I haven’t had to charge them once. They are relatively easy to pair and the sound is decent.

CONS:

The color advertised is a little deceiving (at least for the pink ones). The color i received was a muted mauve color, which overall is fine but I still figure it worth mentioning. Others have stated that there is no noise cancelling, so take note if that is something you want.
The main issue I’ve ran into with these is that one ear will randomly lose audio for a few seconds before fixing itself. It happens quite frequently, which can be bothersome. Since I only really wear these when skating/exercising, It is something I can put up with, but if you plan on exclusively using these on a daily, I would choose another option.

TLDR: Afforable, nice fit, long battery, some audio issues.

reviews.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 27, 2026
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
My son and I have had these since Autumn 2023. (Writing in late winter 2026.) They still work beautifully. In my son's case, the case is broken but they still charge up and work fine.

I recently bought these for my husband as well, after he tried the fancy Raycon no-button earbuds. He hated those because he had to tap the whole thing instead of pressing a button. He feels that led to its quick demise - the product being struck all the time. Those Raycon earbuds only lasted a few months.

These also stay on better. And the sound quality is the best of any earbuds we've tried. Certainly better than Raycon and various random earbuds. We'll stick to these from now on.

The only criticism I have is that the case is shaped like a bar of soap and they do tend to squirt out of your hand and go flying, which is how my son's case got broken. However, the earbuds come with an offer to replace them if they break, so I feel like that is good enough.

These are good earbuds! Don't ever get rid of this product!

reviews.date: Reviewed in Brazil on December 1, 2022
reviews.title: N/A
reviews.body:
Eu daria nota 4.5, mas como não é possível ficou 4 mesmo. Ainda assim recomendo o fone, e ele vale o valor pago.

Vantagens:
- Bateria dura bastante (ainda não consegui calcular exatamente, mas consigo usar cerca de 2-3h por dia, 6 dias por semana sem precisar carregar a caixinha).
- Pareamento muito fácil.
- Modo único funciona perfeitamente: se estiver usando só um fone, basta tirar o outro da caixinha e eles pareiam automaticamente. Fazendo o inverso, guardando um fone, o outro não para de funcionar.
- Som razoável pelo preço.

Desvantagens:
- Uso há uns 2 meses, e até hoje não entendi em qual idioma ele fala (avisando sobre o pareamento, ligando/desligando, etc), e não encontrei informações sobre a possibilidade de configurar outra linguagem.
- Esse é o modelo T16. Já tive um T17, e comparando os dois, o som do T17 é muito melhor, principalmente nos graves. Inclusive a caixinha do T16 também carrega o T17!
- Botões de volume nos fones não funcionam (Também não funcionavam no T17), o que não é um problema grave, mas faltam informações sobre isso ser um defeito ou alguma configuração necessária extra que deva ser feita.

name: Active Noise Cancelling Wireless Earbuds Bluetooth Headphones 90 Hrs Playtime Ear Buds with Hi-Res Stereo Deep Bass Power Display Earphones with Earhooks Waterproof Transparency Headset Sports/Running
highlights: 【Active Noise Cancelling & Hi-Fi Stereo Audio】X19 wireless bluetooth earbuds are equipped with newly upgraded active noise cancelling (ANC) technology,which actively blocks surrounding noise,transforming a noisy gym environment into a tranquil personal space.Featuring a 14.2 mm dual-chamber speaker driver unit,these noise cancelling earbuds are precision-engineered to deliver crisp,balanced and immersive surround sound with deep bass.Additionally,the inclusion of two exclusive built-in noise-canceling microphones significantly enhances the performance of conference calls,ensuring that your voice comes through with clarity and volume during phone conversations.

【90 Hours Playtime & Transparency Mode】Each earbud offers up to 8 hours of continuous listening time on a single charge.When paired with the charging case,GNMN wireless earbuds deliver a remarkable total of 90 hours of uninterrupted music playback.Moreover, the built-in dual LED power display enhances battery status visibility for both the case and headphones.Switch to Transparency mode on your in ear noise cancelling ear buds when you need to be aware of your surroundings, such as transportation announcements,Outdoor sports etc.

【Designed for Sports & IPX7 Waterproof】Boasting a comfortable, ergonomic design with flexible, secure-fit ear hooks, these wireless earphones with earhooks snugly and securely fit into your ears, even during vigorous exercise, preventing any unwelcome slips. With the inclusion of four pairs of rubber ear tips in various sizes (XS, S, M, L), you can enjoy a fatigue-free and painless listening experience, even if you have smaller ears. IPX7 waterproof rating guarantees protection against water droplets and sweat, making these wireless sports earbuds the perfect choice for workouts, running, and gym sessions.

【Bluetooth 5.3 & Auto quick Pairing】Adopting advanced wireless technology, these in-ear ear buds will automatically connect with your device quickly once taking them out from the charging case (After the first successful connection). With upgraded Bluetooth 5.3 technology, you can get a faster transfer speed and a more stable connection, sync audio and video without delay, widely compatible with most iOS/Android smartphones, TV, computer, Laptop, smart watch etc,.

【Independent Volume Controls & One-key Reset】Equipped with separate multi-function and volume buttons, these bluetooth headset enable you to easily control music, manage calls, and activate voice assistants. Each true wireless earbud has complete volume and track control functions, allowing you to manage all features even when using just one earbud. For added convenience, the charging case is equipped with a reset button, streamlining the reset process. Simply press and hold the reset button to instantly restore these wireless headphones to their factory settings.
